papers.title: On the Limitations of Non-GPU AI Accelerators for Large-Model Inference: A Field Study of MoE and Multimodal Serving on Huawei Ascend
papers.abstract: Non-GPU AI accelerators are increasingly adopted as alternatives to general-purpose GPUs for large-model inference, but the real engineering cost of migrating demanding workloads beyond CUDA remains poorly documented. We present a field study of deploying two large inference workloads on a 16-device Huawei Ascend 910 system using CANN and vLLM-Ascend: an LLM-as-a-judge safety and alignment evaluation pipeline based on a W8A8 MoE judge model, DeepSeek-V4-Flash, and a multimodal medical vision--language benchmark based on DeepSeek-V4-Flash-Vision for MMMU and MMMU-Pro. Making these workloads reliable required twelve source-level patches to the vendor inference plugin, disabling several high-throughput features to preserve numerical correctness, and adding operational safeguards for recurring device-level failures. We summarize the main platform limitations in eight categories: incomplete operator and feature support, fragile parallelism, numerical faults in low-level kernels, immature graph compilation, unstable advanced features, limited scalability, weak observability, and ecosystem fragmentation. For each category, we report the symptoms, evidence, and likely causes. We also quantify the integration effort, concurrency behavior, and benchmark quality to show that both workloads were served correctly. Our study provides a reproducible reference for teams evaluating or operating non-GPU accelerators for large-model inference.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文系统记录了在 16 卡华为昇腾 910 平台上部署两类大模型推理工作负载的工程实践，包括基于 W8A8 MoE judge 模型的 LLM-as-a-judge 流水线，以及基于 DeepSeek-V4-Flash-Vision 的多模态基准服务。作者发现，把这类高要求工作负载迁移到非 GPU 加速器上需要对厂商推理插件进行多处源码级修补，还要关闭部分高吞吐特性并加入运维保护措施。论文进一步将平台局限总结为八大类，并从症状、证据和可能原因层面给出分析，同时说明两类工作负载最终可以被正确服务。
innovations: 以实地部署研究的方式，具体刻画非 GPU 加速器承载大模型推理时的真实集成成本与工程复杂度。
围绕 MoE 推理与多模态服务两个代表性工作负载，总结出不完整算子支持、并行脆弱、数值故障、图编译不成熟等八类平台限制。
不仅报告问题类别，还结合症状、证据和可能原因进行归因分析，并量化集成工作量、并发行为与基准质量。
提供可复现的部署与运维参考，帮助团队评估非 GPU 大模型推理平台的可行性与风险。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向大模型推理基础设施选型与迁移评估，适用于团队计划将 MoE 模型、LLM-as-a-judge 流水线或多模态推理服务从 CUDA/GPU 生态迁移到昇腾等非 GPU AI 加速器时的工程决策与风险排查。
papers.title_en: On the Limitations of Non-GPU AI Accelerators for Large-Model Inference: A Field Study of MoE and Multimodal Serving on Huawei Ascend

papers.title: PERFOPT-Bench: Evaluating Coding Agents on Software Performance Optimization
papers.institutions_raw: document.documentElement.classList.add('js'); [2607.07744] PERFOPT-Bench: Evaluating Coding Agents on Software Performance Optimization Skip to main content arXiv is now an independent nonprofit! Learn more × Search Submit Donate Log in Search arXiv Press Enter to search · Advanced search --> Computer Science > Software Engineering arXiv:2607.07744 (cs) [Submitted on 8 Jul 2026] Title: PERFOPT-Bench: Evaluating Coding Agents on Software Performance Optimization Authors: Yingyun Cui , Yi Xie , Piaohong Wang , Jiawei Ma , Bo Liu , Liangliang Cao View a PDF of the paper titled PERFOPT-Bench: Evaluating Coding Agents on Software Performance Optimization, by Yingyun Cui and 5 other authors View PDF HTML (experimental) Abstract: Coding-agent benchmarks have largely measured whether agents can produce functionally correct patches, but production software also demands measurable speedups on real execution targets. Performance optimization is a distinct agentic task: agents must profile executions, diagnose cross-layer bottlenecks, edit code without breaking correctness, and verify that gains are reproducible rather than measurement artifacts. We introduce PERFOPT-Bench, a benchmark for evaluating this full performance-engineering loop. Each task provides a correct but deliberately suboptimal codebase and asks the agent to improve a target performance metric; scoring requires hidden correctness tests, verified-speedup measurement, and trajectory-level audit. We evaluate 7 agent stacks with different LLMs and agent frameworks on 7 long-horizon optimization tasks. The results show that optimization performance is workload-dependent rather than determined by model identity alone: no single stack dominates, and changing the agent framework can materially change the same LLM's per-task speedup profile. We further find that raw speedup is unsafe as a benchmark score, since some large gains arise from benchmark-specific shortcut exploitation; an exploratory relay pilot suggests that restarting from an externalized optimization summary can recover additional headroom after an initial session stops. The benchmark and our evaluation are available at: this https URL . papers.title_zh: PERFOPT-Bench：面向软件性能优化的代码智能体评测基准
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: PERFOPT-Bench 是一个评测代码智能体进行软件性能优化能力的基准，强调不仅要生成功能正确的补丁，还要在真实执行目标上实现可验证的性能提升。每个任务都提供功能正确但性能欠佳的代码库，要求智能体完成性能分析、瓶颈诊断、代码修改以及可复现的提速验证。实验表明，优化效果高度依赖具体工作负载和智能体框架，不能仅凭模型本身判断优劣。
innovations: 提出覆盖完整性能工程闭环的代码智能体基准，而不仅评估功能正确性。
评测设计同时要求隐藏正确性测试、经验证的加速测量以及轨迹级审计。
指出仅用原始 speedup 作为评分存在风险，因为可能出现利用基准捷径而非真实优化的情况。
探索性分析了在单轮会话结束后，基于外化优化总结继续接力优化的潜力。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于评估代码智能体在真实软件性能工程中的能力，尤其适合需要 profiling、跨层瓶颈定位、代码优化和严格性能复现验证的工程场景。
papers.title_en: PERFOPT-Bench: Evaluating Coding Agents on Software Performance Optimization

papers.title: PARA-PV: Physics-Aware Retrieval-Augmented PV Prediction Based on Frozen Foundation Model and Distribution Shift Correction
papers.abstract: Accurate photovoltaic (PV) power forecasting is essential for reliable grid dispatch and renewable energy integration, yet it remains challenging because PV generation is jointly shaped by weather variability, day-night transitions, regime-dependent dynamics, and strict physical constraints. We propose PARA-PV, a Physics-Aware Retrieval-Augmented framework that embeds physical knowledge throughout the forecasting process. The framework first encodes multivariate PV observations into patch-level representations and, through a physics-aware retrieval-augmented learner, retrieves historical patches and analog trajectories that are consistent with the current window in temporal shape, power level, PV operating state, and intra-day period; this yields a physically grounded base forecast. To supplement local memory with broader temporal knowledge, the base forecast is then calibrated against a frozen Chronos time-series foundation-model prior through a lightweight residual adapter, so that general temporal regularities are adapted to PV-specific dynamics without overriding the physically grounded prediction. Because residual conditional distribution shifts persist when weather and diurnal regimes change, a physics-aware distribution shift correction module subsequently adjusts the preliminary forecast using power, weather, timestamp, and day/night conditions, applying gated mean-shift and scale corrections selectively. Finally, a physics-constrained loss function partitions the samples into peak, ramping, night-time, and regular regimes and adaptively reweights their error contributions, preventing the dominant regular regime from suppressing learning of operationally critical states. Our code is available at this https URL .

Finally, a physics-constrained loss function partitions the samples into peak, ramping, night-time, and regular regimes and adaptively reweights their error contributions, preventing the dominant regular regime from suppressing learning of operationally critical states. Our code is available at this https URL . papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出 PARA-PV，用于提升光伏发电功率预测在天气变化、昼夜切换和运行状态变化下的准确性。方法先用物理感知的检索增强机制，从历史片段中检索与当前窗口在形态、功率水平、运行状态和日内时段上相近的样本，得到基础预测；再结合冻结的 Chronos 时间序列基础模型先验进行残差校准。随后，方法进一步通过分布偏移校正和物理约束损失，处理不同天气与昼夜条件下的条件分布变化。
innovations: 提出物理感知的检索增强预测框架，在检索阶段显式利用功率水平、运行状态和日内时段等物理相关信息。
将冻结的时间序列基础模型 Chronos 作为先验，通过轻量残差适配器补充更广泛的时间规律，而不直接覆盖物理驱动的基础预测。
设计物理感知的分布偏移校正模块，针对天气与昼夜变化下的残差条件分布变化进行选择性均值和尺度修正。
提出物理约束损失，将样本划分为峰值、爬坡、夜间和常规等工况并自适应重加权，以强化关键运行状态学习。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向电网调度与可再生能源接入中的光伏功率预测问题，适用于天气波动明显、昼夜转换频繁、工况分布不稳定的光伏电站预测场景。尤其适合需要同时结合历史相似样本、基础模型先验和物理约束的时序预测任务。
papers.title_en: PARA-PV: Physics-Aware Retrieval-Augmented PV Prediction Based on Frozen Foundation Model and Distribution Shift Correction

papers.title: Structured Pruning of Large Language Models via Power Transformation and Sign-Preserving Score Aggregation with Adaptive Feature Retention
papers.abstract: This paper proposes an improved structured pruning method for large language models (LLMs) that addresses key challenges in adapting Adaptive Feature Retention (AFR), an unstructured pruning technique, to structured pruning. When applying AFR to structured pruning, three major problems arise: distribution mismatch between heterogeneous pruning scores, loss of sign information indicating optimization direction consistency, and influence of outliers. To address these issues, we propose a unified approach combining power transformation for nonlinear distribution alignment, sign-preserving score aggregation, and percentile-based outlier removal. Experiments on Llama-3-8B, Vicuna-v1.5-13B, and LLaVA-v1.5-13B demonstrate that our method maintains accuracy comparable to unstructured pruning while achieving practical inference speedup through structured pruning.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出一种改进的大语言模型结构化剪枝方法，目标是把原本用于非结构化剪枝的 Adaptive Feature Retention（AFR）更有效地迁移到结构化剪枝场景。作者指出直接迁移 AFR 会遇到异构剪枝分数分布不匹配、反映优化方向一致性的符号信息丢失以及异常值干扰等问题。为此，论文结合幂变换、保符号分数聚合和基于百分位数的异常值去除，在多个语言与多模态模型上实现了接近非结构化剪枝的精度，同时获得更实用的推理加速。
innovations: 系统识别 AFR 迁移到结构化剪枝时的三类核心问题：分数分布不匹配、符号信息丢失和异常值影响。
提出用幂变换进行非线性分布对齐，以更稳健地融合异构剪枝分数。
设计保符号的分数聚合方式，保留不同优化信号在方向一致性上的信息。
引入基于百分位数的异常值去除机制，提升结构化剪枝评分的鲁棒性。
papers.scenario_cn: 针对大语言模型和视觉语言模型的结构化压缩与推理加速问题，适用于希望在尽量保持精度的前提下获得更可部署、更具实际吞吐收益的剪枝模型场景。
papers.title_en: Structured Pruning of Large Language Models via Power Transformation and Sign-Preserving Score Aggregation with Adaptive Feature Retention

papers.title: SMetric: Rethink LLM Scheduling for Serving Agents with Balanced Session-centric Scheduling
papers.abstract: LLM scheduling is critical to serving, yet it remains unclear how well existing designs fit agentic serving--with LLM requests issued by agents instead of humans. This shifts the workload in two ways: (1) agents act only on complete responses, making the cluster's tokens per second (TPS) the primary goal and relaxing--not eliminating--per-token latency requirements; and (2) requests share much of their KV\$-reuse exceeds 80% of request tokens in a production trace from BAILIAN, versus 54-62% in chat. This paper first contributes a systematic study of request scheduling for agents on two real-world traces. We find that to increase KV\$ reuse, existing schedulers overly prioritize routing requests to instances caching their KV\$, overloading a few while leaving the rest idle, capping TPS. We thus present two key insights: (1) load balance need not sacrifice all KV\$ reuse, thanks to the global-tier KV\$ store and (2) by utilizing the workload's intra-session locality, balancing a small fraction of requests--the first request in each agent session--suffices to balance the cluster without sacrificing most KV\$ reuse on local instances. SMETRIC realizes these insights with balanced session-centric scheduling: it routes each session's first request purely for load balance and its follow-up requests in a cache-aware manner, preserving load balance and local reuse while keeping demand on the global tier low. Using the session turn information as the scheduling metric is deliberate: it is derived efficiently and accurately from the user inputs alone, so the scheduler stays clean and stateless. SMETRIC improves cluster TPS by 10-16% under prefill-decode colocation with a global store and prefill TPS by 2-34% under disaggregation over state-of-the-art schedulers, also with a better per-token latency.

papers.title_zh: SMetric：用平衡的会话中心调度重新思考面向 Agent 的 LLM 服务调度
papers.institution: 未明确提供
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文研究 LLM 调度在 Agent 服务场景下是否仍适用传统面向人类对话的设计。作者指出，Agent 请求更看重完整响应后的整体吞吐，并且同一会话内存在更强的 KV 缓存复用，因此单纯追求缓存命中会让少数实例过载、限制集群 TPS。为此论文提出一种平衡的会话中心调度方法：首个会话请求优先做负载均衡，后续请求再结合缓存感知路由，以同时兼顾吞吐、缓存复用与时延。
innovations: 系统分析了 Agent 服务场景下的 LLM 调度特征，强调其与传统聊天式服务在目标和请求相关性上的差异。
提出 balanced session-centric scheduling，将会话首请求与后续请求区别对待，以小代价换取全局负载均衡。
利用会话内局部性，只平衡少量首请求即可在不明显牺牲本地 KV 复用的前提下改善集群利用率。
采用仅基于用户输入可高效推导的会话轮次作为调度指标，使调度器保持简洁和无状态。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向多轮 Agent 工作流的 LLM 推理服务与集群调度场景，尤其适用于存在较强会话内上下文复用、需要在 KV cache 复用和整体吞吐之间做权衡的在线服务系统。
papers.title_en: SMetric: Rethink LLM Scheduling for Serving Agents with Balanced Session-centric Scheduling

papers.title: Tool-Making and Self-Evolving LLM Agents in Low-Latency Systems
papers.abstract: Production LLM agents often waste latency and reliability by regenerating code for the same procedural steps on every request. We replace this inference-time coding loop with an agentic tool-making pipeline that compiles repeated SOP steps into validated, versioned tools before deployment. The tool-maker grounds synthesis in the live environment as it collects execution traces, observes backend schemas and values, generates candidate tools, and repairs them against labeled cases. At runtime, the production agent calls these tools directly and falls back to code generation only when needed. We deploy the approach in a Fulfillment Center alarm-triage system, where an agent diagnoses alarms against a 44-node SOP over heterogeneous metric backends. In production, tool calls reduce p50 latency by 42%. On 1,500 historical alarms, they reduce end-to-end error rate by up to 53% by suppressing run-to-run variance in repeated steps. Because tools return compact structured verdicts, they also enable a simpler direct-call architecture, reducing p50 latency by a further 62% in a controlled ablation. Versioned tools also improve auditability and expose specification gaps and upstream data drift. Our results show that self-evolving agents can make industrial LLM systems faster, more reliable, and easier to operate.

papers.title_zh: 低时延系统中的工具构建与自进化 LLM Agent
papers.institution: 未明确提供
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文关注生产环境 LLM Agent 在重复 SOP 步骤上反复生成代码所带来的时延和稳定性问题。作者提出一种“先造工具、后在线调用”的自进化 Agent 流程，把重复过程预先编译成经过验证和版本化管理的工具，运行时优先直接调用，仅在必要时回退到代码生成。论文在告警分诊系统中展示了该思路可提升低时延工业 Agent 的效率、可靠性与可运维性。
innovations: 提出 agentic tool-making pipeline，将重复 SOP 步骤在部署前沉淀为可验证、可版本管理的工具，而非每次推理时临时生成代码。
工具构建过程结合真实运行环境中的执行轨迹、后端 schema 与数值观察，并基于标注案例自动修复候选工具。
运行时采用“优先工具调用、必要时回退代码生成”的混合执行策略，兼顾效率与覆盖面。
将工具输出设计为紧凑的结构化结论，支持更直接的系统架构，并提升审计性与对规格缺口、数据漂移的暴露能力。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于低时延、强流程化、重复步骤多的工业级 Agent 系统，如告警分诊、运维诊断、企业 SOP 自动化等场景，目标是在保证能力覆盖的同时降低响应时延和运行波动。
papers.title_en: Tool-Making and Self-Evolving LLM Agents in Low-Latency Systems

papers.title: CausalDS: Benchmarking Causal Reasoning in Data-Science Agents
papers.abstract: Comments: 55 pages, 10 figures
papers.institutions_raw: document.documentElement.classList.add('js'); [2607.08093] CausalDS: Benchmarking Causal Reasoning in Data-Science Agents Skip to main content arXiv is now an independent nonprofit! Learn more × Search Submit Donate Log in Search arXiv Press Enter to search · Advanced search --> Computer Science > Artificial Intelligence arXiv:2607.08093 (cs) [Submitted on 9 Jul 2026] Title: CausalDS: Benchmarking Causal Reasoning in Data-Science Agents Authors: Andrej Leban , Yuekai Sun View a PDF of the paper titled CausalDS: Benchmarking Causal Reasoning in Data-Science Agents, by Andrej Leban and 1 other authors View PDF HTML (experimental) Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly act as integrated data-science agents, combining abstract reasoning with advanced tool use. Yet the relevant benchmark landscape largely divides into symbolic causal reasoning benchmarks without realistic data analysis or data analysis benchmarks without a principled causal data-generating structure. Furthermore, existing causal evaluation datasets are often restricted to curated examples from existing sources, with diversity coming from limited templatized variations rather than from systematic generation of novel synthetic causal structures. We introduce CausalDS, a benchmark for evaluating causal reasoning in agentic data-science workflows. Each benchmark instance is a scene consisting of a sampled structural causal model (SCM) with generated observational data and an accompanying synthetic natural-language story grounded in a realistic domain. We optionally ground the composition of the benchmark components in empirical distributions obtained from real-world datasets, thus retaining empirical structure while reducing the "causal parrot" risk through completely synthetic generation. From each scene, we then derive tasks spanning all three of Pearl's rungs, with typical data-science prediction tasks appearing as Rung 1. Most tasks include a data science coding component, where the model typically needs to use several tools to arrive at the final answer due to the frequent presence of imperfect observations, which are generated by an observation model. Additionally, recognizing when a question admits no warranted answer and abstaining is treated as a first-class scored outcome. The benchmark thus jointly evaluates symbolic causal reasoning, data science, uncertainty quantification, abstention, and tool use/coding. papers.title_zh: CausalDS：面向数据科学智能体因果推理能力的基准测试
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: CausalDS 是一个用于评估数据科学智能体因果推理能力的基准。论文通过采样结构因果模型，生成观测数据以及对应的自然语言场景描述，并据此构造覆盖 Pearl 三层因果阶梯的任务。该基准同时评测符号因果推理、数据科学编码、工具使用、不确定性量化以及在无充分依据时选择弃答的能力。
innovations: 提出面向 agentic data-science workflow 的因果推理评测基准，而不是将因果推理或数据分析任务割裂评估。
基准实例由完全合成的结构因果模型、观测数据和自然语言故事共同组成，以降低对既有数据集模板化改写的依赖。
任务覆盖 Pearl 因果阶梯的三个层级，并把常见数据科学预测任务纳入 Rung 1。
将“识别问题无法得到有根据答案并选择弃答”设为正式评分维度。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于评估数据科学智能体在真实分析流程中的因果理解与决策能力，尤其适合需要结合数据、代码工具和不确定性判断来完成分析问答的场景。
papers.title_en: CausalDS: Benchmarking Causal Reasoning in Data-Science Agents

papers.title: Towards Efficient Large Language Model Serving: A Survey on System-Aware KV Cache Optimization
papers.abstract: Despite the rapid advancements of large language models (LLMs), LLM serving systems remain memory-intensive and costly. The key-value (KV) cache, which stores KV tensors during autoregressive decoding, is crucial for enabling low-latency, high-throughput LLM inference serving. In this survey, we focus on system-aware KV infrastructure for serving LLMs (abbreviated as sKis). We revisit recent work from a system behavior perspective, organizing existing efforts into three dimensions: execution and scheduling (temporal), placement and migration (spatial), and representation and retention (structural). Furthermore, we analyze cross-behavior co-design affinity and behavior-objective links, highlighting future opportunities. Our work systematizes a rapidly evolving area, providing a foundation for understanding and innovating KV cache designs in modern LLM serving infrastructure.

papers.title_zh: 迈向高效大语言模型服务：系统感知型 KV 缓存优化综述
papers.institution: 未明确提供
papers.summary_cn: 这是一篇关于 LLM 服务中 KV cache 优化的综述论文。作者从系统行为视角梳理了该方向工作，将现有方法归纳为执行与调度、放置与迁移、表示与保留三个维度，并进一步讨论这些行为之间的协同设计关系及其与系统目标的联系。论文旨在为现代 LLM 服务基础设施中的 KV cache 设计提供系统化认知框架。
innovations: 提出 system-aware KV infrastructure 的综述视角，将 KV cache 问题放到完整服务系统行为中统一理解。
把已有研究归纳为时间维的执行与调度、空间维的放置与迁移、结构维的表示与保留三大方向。
分析不同系统行为之间的协同设计亲和性，而非孤立讨论单点优化。
总结行为与优化目标之间的联系，并指出未来潜在研究机会。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于 LLM 推理服务、推理基础设施与 AI Serving 系统设计者，用于理解 KV cache 在吞吐、时延、内存成本等目标之间的系统级权衡，并为后续架构设计或研究选题提供地图式参考。
papers.title_en: Towards Efficient Large Language Model Serving: A Survey on System-Aware KV Cache Optimization

papers.title: Formal Mechanisms for Market Stability in Self-Interested Agent Societies: A Marketplace Simulation Study
papers.abstract: Comments: 23 pages, 8 figures
papers.institutions_raw: document.documentElement.classList.add('js'); [2607.08652] Formal Mechanisms for Market Stability in Self-Interested Agent Societies: A Marketplace Simulation Study Skip to main content arXiv is now an independent nonprofit! Learn more × Search Submit Donate Log in Search arXiv Press Enter to search · Advanced search --> Computer Science > Artificial Intelligence arXiv:2607.08652 (cs) [Submitted on 9 Jul 2026] Title: Formal Mechanisms for Market Stability in Self-Interested Agent Societies: A Marketplace Simulation Study Authors: Eugene Ng Yi Sheng , Bingquan Shen View a PDF of the paper titled Formal Mechanisms for Market Stability in Self-Interested Agent Societies: A Marketplace Simulation Study, by Eugene Ng Yi Sheng and Bingquan Shen View PDF HTML (experimental) Abstract: Self-interested agents, left unconstrained, tend toward defection in repeated social dilemmas, causing cooperative gains from trade to collapse. This paper investigates what formal mechanisms, layered on top of unrestricted communication, are sufficient for a society of such agents to maintain market stability, and how resilient those mechanisms are to adversarial attack. We instantiate the research question as a multi-agent marketplace simulation where 18 LLM agents (DeepSeek-V3) with complementary production specialties must trade within a constrained social network to obtain utility. We conduct two experimental phases: (1) a mechanism comparison across eight conditions under progressive troll injection over 200 rounds, identifying Mediation as the top-performing mechanism; and (2) adversarial red-teaming of Mediation using iteratively prompt-optimised LLM-driven trolls, finding that the best attack (v6) reduces honest-agent utility by 13.3% but cannot collapse the market. Mediation enables recovery even under sustained adversarial pressure. We define adversarial robustness as a mechanism's ability to sustain positive honest-agent utility under optimised attack, and find that Mediation is robust: it can be bent but not broken. papers.title_zh: 自利型智能体社会中市场稳定性的形式化机制：一项市场模拟研究
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文研究在允许自由通信的前提下，哪些形式化机制足以让由自利型智能体组成的社会维持市场稳定。作者将问题具体化为一个多智能体市场模拟，考察不同机制在持续 troll 注入和对抗攻击下的表现。结果显示，中介机制表现最好，即使在优化攻击下也会降低效用但不会让市场彻底崩溃。
innovations: 将市场稳定性问题形式化为自利型 LLM 智能体在受限社交网络中的多轮交易模拟。
系统比较八种机制在逐步增强的 troll 注入条件下的稳定性表现。
进一步对最优机制进行基于 LLM 的迭代式红队攻击评估，用于衡量其对抗鲁棒性。
提出以“在优化攻击下仍能维持诚实智能体正效用”来定义机制的对抗鲁棒性。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于研究多智能体社会、自动化交易协作系统和开放式 Agent 生态中的机制设计问题，特别是需要在自利行为、欺骗干扰和持续对抗压力下维持合作与交易稳定的场景。
papers.title_en: Formal Mechanisms for Market Stability in Self-Interested Agent Societies: A Marketplace Simulation Study

papers.title: A Practical Investigation of Training-free Relaxed Speculative Decoding
papers.abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates sampling from an autoregressive LLM by using a faster auxiliary model to draft tokens which are then verified in parallel by the LLM. Standard speculative decoding is lossless: its rejection and resampling steps exactly preserve the LLM's sampling distribution. Recent work argues that relaxing this strict guarantee can yield further speed-ups, controlled capability-speed trade-offs, or even capability gains. We practically investigate training-free relaxed speculative decoding techniques, unify existing approaches within a shared framework, benchmark them on contemporary settings, and distil takeaways and empirical findings for practitioners. Important takeaways include: relaxation can require considerable capability evaluation unlike lossless speculative decoding, and many relaxed approaches rely on a drafter that is a good language model, making them unsuited for lightweight dedicated multi-token-prediction drafters.

papers.title_zh: 对免训练宽松推测解码的实用研究
papers.institution: 未明确提供
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文研究无需额外训练的宽松推测解码方法，目标是在标准无损 speculative decoding 之外，探索更高速度与能力保持之间的实际权衡。作者将现有相关方法统一到一个共享框架下，并在当代设定中进行实证比较，总结面向实践者的经验结论。论文特别指出，宽松策略往往需要额外能力评测，而且很多方法依赖本身就较强的草稿模型。
innovations: 聚焦 training-free relaxed speculative decoding，讨论不依赖额外训练时如何实现更灵活的加速—能力权衡。
将已有宽松推测解码方法统一到共享分析框架中，便于横向比较与理解。
从实践角度系统评估这些方法在现代设置下的适用性，而不仅是理论可行性。
指出宽松策略对能力评估和草稿模型质量的依赖，澄清其与轻量专用 drafter 的适配边界。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于需要加速自回归大模型采样与推理的系统场景，尤其是希望在严格保持原始采样分布之外，探索更高吞吐或不同能力—速度折中的推理服务与解码优化任务。
papers.title_en: A Practical Investigation of Training-free Relaxed Speculative Decoding

papers.title: DominoTree: Conditional Tree-Structured Drafting with Domino for Speculative Decoding
papers.abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference by drafting several tokens and verifying them in parallel. Block-diffusion drafters such as DFlash produce a draft block in one pass but model only per-position marginals; best-first tree methods such as DDTree expand candidate trees from those marginals. The released Domino drafter adds a GRU-based causal correction that makes each draft token's distribution path-dependent, a structure DDTree's factorized formulation cannot represent. We introduce DominoTree, a training-free best-first draft tree scored by Domino's conditional, non-factorized correction along each root-to-node path, made practical by restricting the per-node correction to a candidate top-M. On Qwen3-4B across eight benchmarks, DominoTree reaches up to 6.6x speedup over autoregressive decoding and the highest mean accept length of any evaluated method, up to 10.7 tokens per round, at every temperature we test. DominoTree constructs its tree with a GPU-native, CUDA-graph builder that is bit-identical to a reference Python implementation, so acceptance is unchanged, while keeping per-round tree construction cheap. With this builder as default, DominoTree wins throughput over the released Domino decoder at every temperature, 9-10% overall on Qwen3-4B and up to +22% on Alpaca, and over DDTree/CaDDTree at every temperature we test. On Qwen3- 8B, DominoTree keeps the highest accepted length at every temperature and adds a decisive throughput win at T=0, +24% over DDTree; at higher temperature that edge over DDTree/CaDDTree narrows to a tie and a small loss, while its Overall aggregate wins over DFlash and Domino persist.

papers.title_zh: DominoTree：用于推测解码的基于 Domino 的条件树结构草拟方法
papers.institution: 未明确提供
papers.summary_cn: 该论文研究大语言模型推测解码加速问题，针对 Domino 草拟器中由 GRU 因果校正引入的路径相关分布，提出了无需训练的最佳优先草稿树方法 DominoTree。它沿树的根到节点路径使用 Domino 的条件式、非因子化校正来打分，并通过限制每个节点的候选 top-M 来控制计算成本。论文还给出了 GPU 原生的 CUDA graph 树构建器，使树构建开销较低且与参考 Python 实现保持一致。
innovations: 提出 DominoTree，将 Domino 的条件式、非因子化校正显式纳入树结构推测解码打分过程，以表达路径依赖的草拟分布。
方法无需额外训练，采用最佳优先搜索构建草稿树，并通过每节点候选 top-M 限制提升可实现性。
设计了 GPU 原生的 CUDA graph 树构建器，在保持与参考实现接受行为一致的前提下降低每轮建树成本。
从方法层面弥补了 DDTree 一类因子化树方法无法表示 Domino 路径相关校正结构的问题。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向大语言模型推理加速，适用于需要通过推测解码提升吞吐、减少自回归逐 token 解码开销的场景，尤其适合采用 Domino 类草拟器并希望进一步利用树搜索提高接受长度与整体吞吐的部署环境。
papers.title_en: DominoTree: Conditional Tree-Structured Drafting with Domino for Speculative Decoding

papers.title: Equivariant Quantum Clustering with Differential Privacy: Parameter-Efficient Privacy-Preserving Analysis Across Heterogeneous Sensitive Datasets
papers.abstract: Privacy-preserving clustering is critical for analyzing sensitive data in healthcare, cybersecurity, and enterprise applications, where maintaining data confidentiality must be balanced with analytical performance. This paper presents Equivariant Quantum Clustering (EQC), a parameter-efficient framework that integrates symmetry-aware quantum circuits with differential privacy to improve the privacy-utility tradeoff. EQC employs p4m equivariant parameter sharing to reduce circuit complexity while preserving informative feature representations. The framework is evaluated on three privacy-sensitive datasets: NSL-KDD, CERT Insider Threat v6.2, and a synthetic MIMIC-III clinical dataset. On the NSL-KDD benchmark, EQC achieves 79.3% clustering accuracy while reducing membership inference attack success to 38.3% under a privacy budget of {\epsilon} = 1.0 and {\delta} = 10^-5, outperforming representative classical and quantum baselines. Ablation studies indicate that the performance gains primarily arise from parameter-efficient circuit design combined with differential privacy. The results demonstrate that EQC provides a practical quantum-ready framework for secure and privacy-preserving clustering across heterogeneous sensitive datasets.

papers.title_zh: 具有差分隐私的等变量子聚类：面向异构敏感数据集的参数高效隐私保护分析
papers.institution: 未明确提供
papers.summary_cn: 该论文提出 Equivariant Quantum Clustering（EQC），将具备对称性感知的量子电路与差分隐私结合，用于敏感数据上的隐私保护聚类分析。方法通过 p4m 等变参数共享降低电路复杂度，同时尽量保留有效特征表示，以改善隐私与效用之间的权衡。论文在网络安全、内部威胁和合成临床数据等多类敏感数据集上进行了评估。
innovations: 提出 EQC 框架，把等变量子电路设计与差分隐私机制统一到隐私保护聚类任务中。
采用 p4m 等变参数共享，减少量子线路参数量与复杂度，同时保持信息表达能力。
面向异构敏感数据集验证同一框架，强调其跨网络安全、企业安全和医疗数据场景的适用性。
通过消融分析指出，性能提升主要来自参数高效电路设计与差分隐私的联合建模。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于医疗、网络安全、企业内部威胁分析等对数据保密要求高、又需要进行聚类分析的场景，目标是在保护隐私的前提下完成对异构敏感数据的模式发现与分组。
papers.title_en: Equivariant Quantum Clustering with Differential Privacy: Parameter-Efficient Privacy-Preserving Analysis Across Heterogeneous Sensitive Datasets

papers.title: Reachability-Preserving Bellman Operator for the Discounted Reach-Cost Value Function: Uniting Hamilton-Jacobi Reachability and Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Hamilton-Jacobi (HJ) reachability provides rigorous safety and reachability guarantees for continuous-time dynamical systems, but its numerical solution suffers from the curse of dimensionality. Deep reinforcement learning (DRL), by contrast, offers scalable sample-based methods. However, RL is typically built around additive cumulative rewards; whereas, reachability objectives are inherently non-additive. This mismatch makes a direct bridge between HJ reachability and RL nontrivial. Recent discounted formulations have either introduced contraction by altering the original reachability semantics, or preserved exact semantics on the HJ side without a corresponding Bellman fixed-point characterization. In this paper, we close this gap by building on a semantics-preserving discounted reach-based value function and deriving a non-additive Bellman operator whose unique fixed point exactly matches the value function in the HJ formulation. We prove that discounting makes this operator contractive, yielding existence, uniqueness, and convergence of value iteration. Furthermore, we establish the equivalence between the HJ and Bellman characterizations, and show that RL can be interpreted as a sample-based approximation scheme for the same fixed-point equation. This yields a principled and semantically exact connection between HJ reachability and RL, enabling learning-based methods to approximate reachability value functions while preserving their safety-critical meaning. As a result, the proposed framework opens the door to scalable, data-driven computation of reachable sets and safety certificates in high-dimensional systems. Numerical experiments demonstrate close agreement with HJ solutions, confirm preservation of reachability semantics via alignment of zero level sets, and support the interpretation of reinforcement learning as a sample-based solver of the proposed Bellman operator.

papers.title_zh: 用于折扣可达代价价值函数的保可达性 Bellman 算子：统一 Hamilton-Jacobi 可达性与强化学习
papers.institution: 未明确提供
papers.summary_cn: 该论文试图打通 Hamilton-Jacobi 可达性分析与强化学习之间的理论连接。作者基于保持原始可达性语义的折扣型 reach-based 价值函数，推导出一个非加性的 Bellman 算子，并证明其唯一不动点与 HJ 形式中的价值函数完全一致。由此，强化学习可以被解释为求解该固定点方程的采样近似方法。
innovations: 提出保持可达性语义的非加性 Bellman 算子，使其与 HJ 可达性价值函数严格对应。
证明折扣机制使该算子具备压缩性，从而得到存在性、唯一性和价值迭代收敛性结果。
建立 HJ 表述与 Bellman 固定点表述的等价关系，填补两者之间缺少统一固定点刻画的空缺。
从理论上将强化学习解释为该可达性方程的采样式近似求解器，为高维安全可达性学习提供原则性基础。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于安全关键控制系统、连续时间动力系统和高维可达域计算场景，尤其是在传统 HJ 数值求解受维数灾难限制时，希望借助学习方法近似可达集与安全证书，同时保持可达性语义不失真的问题。
papers.title_en: Reachability-Preserving Bellman Operator for the Discounted Reach-Cost Value Function: Uniting Hamilton-Jacobi Reachability and Reinforcement Learning

papers.title: Workload-Preserving Differentially Private Synthetic Data for Causal Inference via Maximum-Entropy Calibration
papers.abstract: Workload-based differentially private (DP) synthetic data methods privately measure aggregate queries and post-process the noisy answers into synthetic records. Generic workloads can achieve strong distributional fidelity, but causal estimands such as the average treatment effect (ATE) depend on treatment-arm balance and outcome moments that generic marginals need not preserve. We propose causal workloads: DP query sets designed around the orthogonal moments used by doubly robust causal estimators. The released workload can be used directly by stable moment-map estimators or reconstructed by maximum-entropy calibration into reusable synthetic data; our theory decomposes ATE error into sampling, privacy, workload-approximation, Monte Carlo, and calibration terms. We also introduce Causal-AIM, an adaptive workload selector, and a noise-aware multiple-imputation (NA+MI) procedure for confidence intervals from DP synthetic data. Because the workload is released once, the same DP synthetic table can support ATE, ATT, and subgroup analyses without additional privacy spending. Empirically, causal workloads are most useful at strict privacy budgets and for calibrated uncertainty, while generic workloads often retain an advantage for point RMSE as privacy relaxes. The broader lesson is a tradeoff: distributional fidelity can help point accuracy, but valid causal inference requires preserving causal moments and propagating DP noise rather than treating synthetic rows as real.

papers.title_zh: 通过最大熵校准实现面向因果推断的工作负载保持型差分隐私合成数据
papers.institution: 未明确提供
papers.summary_cn: 该论文关注差分隐私合成数据在因果推断中的适用性问题，指出通用工作负载虽然能较好保持分布，但未必保留平均处理效应等因果估计所依赖的关键矩信息。作者提出围绕双重稳健因果估计器正交矩设计的因果工作负载，并可通过最大熵校准重建为可复用的合成数据。论文还给出了误差分解、自适应工作负载选择方法和面向置信区间的噪声感知多重插补程序。
innovations: 提出面向因果推断的 causal workloads，将差分隐私查询集合围绕双重稳健估计所需正交矩进行专门设计。
引入基于最大熵校准的重建方式，使发布的工作负载结果可转化为可复用的差分隐私合成数据表。
给出 ATE 误差的分解框架，明确采样、隐私、工作负载近似、蒙特卡洛和校准等误差来源。
提出 Causal-AIM 自适应工作负载选择方法，以及面向差分隐私合成数据不确定性估计的噪声感知多重插补程序。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于需要在严格隐私约束下共享或分析数据、同时又要进行 ATE、ATT 或亚组因果分析的场景，如医疗、社会科学和高敏感业务数据分析。尤其适合希望一次发布差分隐私合成数据后支持多种因果估计任务、且重视置信区间有效性的应用。
papers.title_en: Workload-Preserving Differentially Private Synthetic Data for Causal Inference via Maximum-Entropy Calibration

papers.title: BiSCo-LLM: Lookup-Free Binary Spherical Coding for Extreme Low-Bit Large Language Model Compression
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly constrained by memory capacity, weight bandwidth, and checkpoint storage during deployment. Existing low-bit compression methods mainly follow two directions. Scalar or group-wise quantization is simple and compatible with efficient low-precision kernels, but its representation capacity becomes limited when the target budget approaches 2 bits per weight. Vector-quantized weight compression provides a richer block-level representation, but usually introduces explicit codebooks, index lookup, and additional storage accounting. This paper presents BiSCo-LLM, a codebook-free binary spherical coding framework for extreme low-bit LLM weight compression. The core pipeline is built on three components. First, local weight chunks are mapped onto a unit hypersphere and binarized into compact spherical codes, so that the main payload is a bit-packed sign stream rather than explicit VQ centroids. Second, a residual BSQ stage encodes the reconstruction error left by the base spherical codec, providing an explicit rate-distortion path without stored codebooks. Third, category-wise recovery distillation is performed after replacing each Transformer module category, reducing the mismatch between local weight reconstruction and assembled model behavior. A small 8-bit protected-channel path is used as an auxiliary stabilization mechanism for sensitive channels and is counted separately from the BSQ payload. The reported storage budget includes binary codes, neural decoders, protected-channel payloads, LoRA adapters, and metadata.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出 BiSCo-LLM，用于在极低比特预算下压缩大语言模型权重，以缓解部署时的内存容量、权重带宽和检查点存储压力。方法不再依赖显式码本和索引查表，而是把局部权重块映射到单位超球面后进行二值化编码。进一步地，作者加入残差编码与模块类别级恢复蒸馏，以降低重建误差并减轻局部权重重建与整模行为之间的不匹配。
innovations: 提出免码本的二值球面编码框架，将局部权重块映射到单位超球面并编码为紧凑的二值球面码。
设计残差 BSQ 阶段，对基础球面编码后的重建误差继续建模，在不存储码本的前提下提供更清晰的率失真控制路径。
提出按 Transformer 模块类别逐类替换后的恢复蒸馏，缓解局部压缩后整模型组装带来的行为偏差。
引入单独计量的 8-bit 保护通道作为敏感通道稳定机制，以增强极低比特压缩下的可用性。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向大语言模型在显存、带宽和存储都受限的部署场景，尤其适用于希望把模型压缩到接近极低比特预算、但又不希望引入显式码本查表开销的推理与分发场景。
papers.title_en: BiSCo-LLM: Lookup-Free Binary Spherical Coding for Extreme Low-Bit Large Language Model Compression

papers.title: Achieving Unanimous Consensus Through Multi-Agent Deliberation
papers.abstract: Comments: 6 pages, 4 figure, 2 tables
papers.institutions_raw: document.documentElement.classList.add('js'); [2504.02128] Achieving Unanimous Consensus Through Multi-Agent Deliberation Skip to main content arXiv is now an independent nonprofit! Learn more × Search Submit Donate Log in Search arXiv Press Enter to search · Advanced search --> Computer Science > Multiagent Systems arXiv:2504.02128 (cs) [Submitted on 2 Apr 2025 ( v1 ), last revised 8 Feb 2026 (this version, v2)] Title: Achieving Unanimous Consensus Through Multi-Agent Deliberation Authors: Apurba Pokharel , Ram Dantu , Shakila Zaman , Vinh Quach , Sirisha Talapuru View a PDF of the paper titled Achieving Unanimous Consensus Through Multi-Agent Deliberation, by Apurba Pokharel and 4 other authors View PDF HTML (experimental) Abstract: Blockchain consensus mechanisms have relied on algorithms such as Proof-of-Work (PoW) and Proof-of-Stake (PoS) to ensure network functionality and integrity. However, these approaches struggle with adaptability for decision-making where the opinions of each matter rather than reaching an agreement based on honest majority or weighted consensus. This paper introduces a novel deliberation-based consensus mechanism where Large Language Models (LLMs) act as rational agents engaging in structured discussions to reach a unanimous consensus. By leveraging graded consensus and a multi-round deliberation process, our approach ensures unanimous consensus for definitive problems and graded consensus for prioritized decision problems and policies. We provide a formalization of our system and use it to show that the properties of blockchains are maintained, while also addressing the behavior in terms of adversaries, stalled deliberations, and confidence in consensus. Moreover, experimental results demonstrate system feasibility, showcasing convergence, block properties, and accuracy, which enable deliberative decision-making on blockchain networks. papers.title_zh: 通过多智能体审议实现一致同意共识
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出一种基于审议的共识机制，让大语言模型充当理性智能体，通过结构化讨论达成一致结论。与依赖诚实多数或权重投票的传统区块链共识不同，该方法更适合每个参与者意见都重要的决策问题。论文还对该系统进行了形式化描述，并讨论了对抗者、审议停滞和共识置信度等问题。
innovations: 提出以多轮结构化审议为核心的共识机制，用 LLM 智能体替代传统多数派式区块链共识流程。
结合 unanimous consensus 与 graded consensus，使系统既能处理确定性问题，也能处理带优先级的决策与策略问题。
对系统进行了形式化建模，并分析其在保持区块链性质前提下对对抗行为和停滞情形的处理。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向区块链网络中的复杂决策场景，尤其适用于不能仅靠多数投票、而需要充分吸收各方意见的治理、策略选择和优先级决策问题。
papers.title_en: Achieving Unanimous Consensus Through Multi-Agent Deliberation

papers.title: Game Theory Driven Multi-Agent Framework Mitigates Language Model Hallucination
papers.institutions_raw: document.documentElement.classList.add('js'); [2607.08403] Game Theory Driven Multi-Agent Framework Mitigates Language Model Hallucination Skip to main content arXiv is now an independent nonprofit! Learn more × Search Submit Donate Log in Search arXiv Press Enter to search · Advanced search --> Computer Science > Artificial Intelligence arXiv:2607.08403 (cs) [Submitted on 9 Jul 2026] Title: Game Theory Driven Multi-Agent Framework Mitigates Language Model Hallucination Authors: Runzhe Liu , Biquan Bie , Zihao Wang , Yuchao Ma , Yexin Liu , Xinghai Li , Harry Yang , Wenbo Yang , Jinzhe Cao , Shengyang Tao View a PDF of the paper titled Game Theory Driven Multi-Agent Framework Mitigates Language Model Hallucination, by Runzhe Liu and 9 other authors View PDF HTML (experimental) Abstract: The application of lightweight Large Language Models in rule-based scientific domains remains severely limited by their tendency to mimic linguistic patterns rather than reproduce axiomatic reasoning, causing frequent hallucinations. Here, we show that G-Frame, an adaptive multi-agent framework integrating Bayesian and team game principles, establishes an automated closed-loop for high-quality data synthesis and model training. By forcing the internalization of domain constraints through structured reasoning, we synthesized a specialized corpus of 363,045 chains-of-thought and 199,589 question-answer pairs. The resulting 7B model OmniChem achieves performance parity with GPT 4o mini on custom benchmarks and ChemBench while exhibiting a 79.46% reduction in hallucinations relative to its base architecture. We further demonstrate the advanced capabilities of OmniChem in molecular design and synthesis planning. This work establishes a scalable paradigm utilizing adaptive multi-agents to overcome inherent reasoning deficiencies, offering a feasible pathway for accelerating knowledge discovery in specialized scientific fields. papers.title_zh: 博弈论驱动的多智能体框架缓解语言模型幻觉
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文针对轻量级大语言模型在规则严格的科学领域中容易产生幻觉的问题，提出了一个名为 G-Frame 的自适应多智能体框架。该框架结合贝叶斯思想和团队博弈原则，构建了高质量数据合成与模型训练的自动闭环。作者据此训练出面向化学领域的 OmniChem，并表明这种方法有助于把领域约束内化到推理过程中。
innovations: 提出融合贝叶斯机制与团队博弈原则的多智能体框架，用于抑制科学领域中的语言模型幻觉。
构建数据合成与模型训练一体化的闭环流程，强调通过结构化推理内化领域约束。
将该框架用于构建化学领域专用模型，展示了多智能体方法在专业科学推理中的可扩展范式。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于化学等规则明确、依赖公理化推理的科学领域，用来降低轻量模型在专业问答、分子设计、合成规划等任务中的幻觉风险。
papers.title_en: Game Theory Driven Multi-Agent Framework Mitigates Language Model Hallucination

papers.title: MASTE: A Multi-Agent Pipeline for Zero-Shot Aspect Sentiment Triplet Extraction
papers.institutions_raw: document.documentElement.classList.add('js'); [2607.08080] MASTE: A Multi-Agent Pipeline for Zero-Shot Aspect Sentiment Triplet Extraction Skip to main content arXiv is now an independent nonprofit! Learn more × Search Submit Donate Log in Search arXiv Press Enter to search · Advanced search --> Computer Science > Computation and Language arXiv:2607.08080 (cs) [Submitted on 9 Jul 2026] Title: MASTE: A Multi-Agent Pipeline for Zero-Shot Aspect Sentiment Triplet Extraction Authors: Ao Hong , Lehang Wang , Zhirun Yue , Mingxin Wang , Zihan Wang , Houde Liu View a PDF of the paper titled MASTE: A Multi-Agent Pipeline for Zero-Shot Aspect Sentiment Triplet Extraction, by Ao Hong and 5 other authors View PDF HTML (experimental) Abstract: Aspect Sentiment Triplet Extraction (ASTE) requires jointly identifying (aspect, opinion, sentiment) triples from a given review sentence. While large language models (LLMs) achieve strong zero-shot performance on many NLP benchmarks, their effectiveness on ASTE remains limited, as single-pass generation forces the model to determine span boundaries, opinion grouping, and sentiment polarity in a single decoding step. Common remedies, such as few-shot in-context learning and chain-of-thought prompting, offer only marginal improvements and rely heavily on either in-domain demonstrations sampled from labeled training data or carefully engineered reasoning prompts, neither of which is broadly available in zero-shot deployment. Inspired by the classical agent paradigm, we propose MASTE, a multi-agent pipeline for zero-shot Aspect Sentiment Triplet Extraction. MASTE decomposes ASTE into four sequential stages, where specialized agents handle different compositional subtasks with explicit conditioning on prior outputs. This design enables entirely training-free zero-shot ASTE and generalizes across different backbones and datasets. Extensive experiments on four ASTE benchmarks show that MASTE substantially outperforms zero-shot and chain-of-thought LLM baselines under the same backbone, narrowing the gap to fully supervised methods without using any labeled triplets. Code is available at this https URL . papers.title_zh: MASTE：用于零样本方面级情感三元组抽取的多智能体流水线
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文研究零样本 Aspect Sentiment Triplet Extraction（方面-观点-情感三元组抽取）问题。作者认为单次生成方式要求模型同时决定边界、观点归组和情感极性，因此效果受限。为此论文提出 MASTE，将任务拆成四个顺序阶段，由不同专职智能体逐步完成，从而在无需训练和无需标注三元组的条件下提升零样本效果。
innovations: 提出面向零样本 ASTE 的多智能体流水线，将复杂联合抽取任务分解为四个顺序子任务。
每个阶段由专门智能体处理，并显式依赖前序输出，降低单步生成同时完成多项决策的难度。
实现完全 training-free 的零样本 ASTE，并强调其可跨不同模型骨干与数据集泛化。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于评论分析、舆情理解和细粒度情感挖掘等场景，尤其适合缺少标注数据、但希望直接用大模型完成方面级情感三元组抽取的零样本部署场景。
papers.title_en: MASTE: A Multi-Agent Pipeline for Zero-Shot Aspect Sentiment Triplet Extraction

papers.title: Multi-Agent Firewall Architecture for Privacy Protection of Sensitive Data in Interactions with Language Models
papers.institutions_raw: document.documentElement.classList.add('js'); [2607.08282] Multi-Agent Firewall Architecture for Privacy Protection of Sensitive Data in Interactions with Language Models Skip to main content arXiv is now an independent nonprofit! Learn more × Search Submit Donate Log in Search arXiv Press Enter to search · Advanced search --> Computer Science > Cryptography and Security arXiv:2607.08282 (cs) [Submitted on 9 Jul 2026] Title: Multi-Agent Firewall Architecture for Privacy Protection of Sensitive Data in Interactions with Language Models Authors: Hugo García Cuesta , Pablo Mateo Torrejón , Alfonso Sánchez-Macián View a PDF of the paper titled Multi-Agent Firewall Architecture for Privacy Protection of Sensitive Data in Interactions with Language Models, by Hugo Garc\'ia Cuesta and 2 other authors View PDF HTML (experimental) Abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have become essential productivity tools, their integration into workflows without adequate safeguards creates significant risks. This paper proposes an open-source, privacy-focused, user-facing firewall designed to secure both web-based and programmatic LLM interactions. The architecture combines a browser extension and a proxy for total traffic interception across both HTTP(S) and WebSocket communications. At its core, a flexible multi-agent pipeline delivers data leakage prevention through a hybrid approach combining deterministic detectors with LLM-driven semantic analysis, proprietary code leakage prevention, and extensible components designed for future security enhancements such as prompt injection evasion. The framework's layered architecture enables deployment across heterogeneous environments, allowing organizations to balance computational cost, detection depth and latency. Evaluation results demonstrate it achieves F1 scores of up to 94.93% on optimal configurations. papers.title_zh: 用于保护与语言模型交互中敏感数据隐私的多智能体防火墙架构
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出一个面向用户侧的隐私保护防火墙，用于保障与大语言模型进行网页端和程序化交互时的敏感数据安全。系统由浏览器扩展和代理组成，可拦截 HTTP(S) 与 WebSocket 流量。其核心是一个灵活的多智能体流水线，通过确定性检测器与基于 LLM 的语义分析相结合来实现数据泄露防护，并为未来扩展提示注入规避等安全能力预留接口。
innovations: 提出面向 LLM 交互安全的多智能体防火墙架构，同时覆盖网页端与程序接口流量。
采用浏览器扩展加代理的组合方式，实现对 HTTP(S) 和 WebSocket 通信的全面拦截。
将确定性检测与 LLM 语义分析结合，用于敏感信息泄露与专有代码泄露防护，并保留后续安全扩展能力。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于企业或个人在使用聊天式 LLM、网页助手、API 接入模型时的隐私与数据安全防护，尤其适合需要拦截敏感文本、专有代码或未来防御提示注入攻击的场景。
papers.title_en: Multi-Agent Firewall Architecture for Privacy Protection of Sensitive Data in Interactions with Language Models

papers.title: Open-ended Multi-agent Autocurricula via Visual Inspection of Policies with Multi-modal LLMs
papers.institutions_raw: document.documentElement.classList.add('js'); [2607.08193] Open-ended Multi-agent Autocurricula via Visual Inspection of Policies with Multi-modal LLMs Skip to main content arXiv is now an independent nonprofit! Learn more × Search Submit Donate Log in Search arXiv Press Enter to search · Advanced search --> Computer Science > Machine Learning arXiv:2607.08193 (cs) [Submitted on 9 Jul 2026] Title: Open-ended Multi-agent Autocurricula via Visual Inspection of Policies with Multi-modal LLMs Authors: Lorenzo Pantè , Andrea Fanti , Roberto Capobianco View a PDF of the paper titled Open-ended Multi-agent Autocurricula via Visual Inspection of Policies with Multi-modal LLMs, by Lorenzo Pant\`e and 2 other authors View PDF HTML (experimental) Abstract: Open-ended curricula in Reinforcement Learning (RL) aim to train generally-capable agents by identifying tasks that facilitate learning increasingly complex skills. A major challenge when designing such curricula is assessing task difficulty relative to the agent's current learning progress. While previous work has explored using scalar task scores or textual summaries of the agent's behavior, here we study a different approach: directly inspecting policy behavior via recorded episode videos. We introduce a simple yet effective instantiation of this approach which leverages a Video Language Model (VLM) to both process these videos and provide curriculum recommendations, which we call Visual Inspection of Policies (VIP). Since videos can naturally contain any number of controllable agents, we empirically study VIP on the StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenge (SMAC). We show that even with a lightweight and openly accessible VLM (VideoLLaMa2-7B), VIP can use policy videos to generate more effective curricula than both its text-only ablation and methods that rely on scalar task scores. papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文研究如何在强化学习中为多智能体系统自动设计开放式课程，以帮助智能体逐步学会更复杂的能力。作者提出 Visual Inspection of Policies（VIP）方法，直接让视频语言模型读取策略执行时的回合视频，并据此给出课程推荐。论文在 StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenge 上进行实验，结果表明即使用轻量且公开可用的 VideoLLaMa2-7B，基于视频的课程生成也优于仅用文本描述或标量任务分数的方法。
innovations: 提出 Visual Inspection of Policies（VIP）框架，用策略执行视频而非标量分数或文本摘要来判断学习进展并推荐课程。
把视频语言模型直接用于多智能体课程设计，使同一输入形式自然覆盖任意数量的可控智能体。
在 SMAC 场景中系统比较视频驱动方法、文本消融版本与基于标量分数的方法，验证视频检查在课程生成上的优势。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向多智能体强化学习中的自动课程生成问题，适用于需要根据当前策略表现持续挑选更合适训练任务的场景，如复杂协作对战环境和开放式技能学习。
papers.title_en: Open-ended Multi-agent Autocurricula via Visual Inspection of Policies with Multi-modal LLMs

papers.title: Playing ZendoWorld: Challenging AI Agents on Active Visual Concept Induction
papers.institutions_raw: document.documentElement.classList.add('js'); [2607.08233] Playing ZendoWorld: Challenging AI Agents on Active Visual Concept Induction Skip to main content arXiv is now an independent nonprofit! Learn more × Search Submit Donate Log in Search arXiv Press Enter to search · Advanced search --> Computer Science > Artificial Intelligence arXiv:2607.08233 (cs) [Submitted on 9 Jul 2026] Title: Playing ZendoWorld: Challenging AI Agents on Active Visual Concept Induction Authors: Sophia Koehler , Antonia Wüst , Inga Ibs , Wasu Top Piriyakulkij , Wolfgang Stammer , Constantin Rothkopf , Kevin Ellis , Kristian Kersting View a PDF of the paper titled Playing ZendoWorld: Challenging AI Agents on Active Visual Concept Induction, by Sophia Koehler and 7 other authors View PDF HTML (experimental) Abstract: A central challenge in building intelligent systems is enabling agents to jointly perceive complex inputs, form hypotheses about hidden patterns, and design informative experiments to test them. To study this problem, we propose ZendoWorld, a controlled interactive environment in which agents must infer a logical rule about visual game observations, acquire information by proposing new scenes, and refine their hypotheses based on feedback from the game environment. We evaluate several agents spanning pure VLM reasoning, Bayesian particle filtering, dynamic concept discovery, and neuro-symbolic methods. Our main findings are: (1) high accuracy in predicting labels for observed examples does not imply recovery of the underlying rule; (2) perception and induction are distinct bottlenecks for different agent classes; and (3) VLM-based agents propose near-uninformative experiments, failing to actively reduce hypothesis uncertainty. To compare these results, we collect human data on the task, which reveals a gap in inductive reasoning, particularly for more complex rules. Overall, ZENDOWORLD takes an important step toward evaluating intelligent agents and identifies concrete avenues for improvement, particularly in domains like scientific discovery. papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出 ZendoWorld，一个用于研究主动视觉概念归纳的可交互环境。智能体需要从视觉游戏观测中推断隐藏的逻辑规则，主动提出新场景获取信息，并根据环境反馈不断修正假设。作者评测了纯 VLM 推理、贝叶斯粒子过滤、动态概念发现和神经符号方法，并结合人类数据分析发现，现有智能体在规则恢复、主动实验设计和复杂归纳推理上仍存在明显不足。
innovations: 提出 ZendoWorld 这一受控交互式评测环境，把感知、假设形成与主动实验设计统一到同一任务中。
从规则恢复而非仅标签预测准确率来衡量智能体能力，揭示“预测对”不等于“真正学到规则”。
对多类方法进行并列评测，并用人类数据作为参照，具体定位感知瓶颈、归纳瓶颈和实验设计不足。
指出基于 VLM 的智能体往往提出信息量很低的实验，难以主动降低假设不确定性。
papers.scenario_cn: 针对需要从视觉观察中发现潜在规则并主动设计试验的智能体评测问题，适用于科学发现、交互式概念学习和主动归纳推理等场景。
papers.title_en: Playing ZendoWorld: Challenging AI Agents on Active Visual Concept Induction

papers.title: APIVOT: Adaptive Planning with Interleaved Vision-Language Thoughts
papers.abstract: Long-horizon robot planning requires jointly reasoning over semantic task structure and geometric feasibility. To successfully execute a task, a robot must decompose goals, select task-relevant objects, and sequence actions, while ensuring that plans satisfy spatial constraints such as limited free space and object collisions. In this work, we propose APIVOT, a VLM-based planner that adaptively interleaves language and visual thoughts for long-horizon planning. APIVOT learns to leverage language for semantic reasoning, while using visual thoughts as imagined future states for internal verification of geometric feasibility. On long-horizon kitchen tasks, APIVOT outperforms general-purpose VLMs and prior planning frameworks, achieving the largest gains in spatially constrained settings. We find that APIVOT learns meaningful modality selection behavior, demonstrating that adaptive interleaving of vision-language thoughts improves both planning success and reasoning efficiency.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文面向长时程机器人规划，关注语义任务分解与几何可行性需要同时满足的问题。作者提出 APIVOT，这是一个基于视觉语言模型的规划器，能够自适应交错使用语言思维和视觉思维。其中文本思维负责语义推理，视觉思维则以想象未来状态的方式验证空间约束和几何可行性。
innovations: 提出自适应交错视觉思维与语言思维的长程规划框架，而非固定单一模态推理。
将视觉思维用作对未来状态的内部想象与几何可行性校验机制。
让模型学习何时使用语言推理、何时使用视觉推理，体现出可学习的模态选择行为。
针对空间受限场景强化规划能力，突出几何约束在长时程任务中的关键作用。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于机器人长时程操作任务，例如厨房整理、取放和多步动作编排等需要同时考虑目标分解、目标物选择和空间碰撞约束的场景。它要解决的是传统通用 VLM 规划在复杂空间约束下容易忽略几何可行性的问题。
papers.title_en: APIVOT: Adaptive Planning with Interleaved Vision-Language Thoughts

papers.title: Answer Set Programming Energised! End-to-End Neurosymbolic Reasoning and Learning with ASP and Energy Based Models
papers.abstract: We present a general neurosymbolic reasoning and learning methodology based on a modular integration of answer set programming with an energy based model substrate. Key contributions are: (1) supporting joint optimisation in the continuous latent space through explicit ASP-based declarative semantics fully incorporating background knowledge, constraints, non-monotonic inference; and (2) advancing recent works at the interface of answer sets, probabilistic logic, and answer set modulo theories by providing a generalised model and practical platform for ASP-centric robust, end-to-end training for applications in dynamic domains (e.g., involving perception and interaction). We provide a practical implementation, and demonstrate basic use and application (with MNIST), and evaluate with the visual question-answering benchmark Clevr and the multi-object tracking benchmark MOT.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出一种通用的神经符号推理与学习方法，将答案集程序设计（ASP）与能量模型底座模块化结合起来。该方法希望把背景知识、约束和非单调推理显式纳入连续潜空间中的联合优化过程，从而实现更稳健的端到端训练。作者还给出了实际实现，并在 MNIST、CLEVR 和多目标跟踪任务上做了演示与评估。
innovations: 提出 ASP 与能量模型的模块化融合框架，将符号语义与连续表示学习统一到端到端训练中。
在联合优化中显式纳入背景知识、逻辑约束和非单调推理，而不是把符号部分仅作为后处理。
推进了答案集、概率逻辑和 answer set modulo theories 交叉方向的统一建模与实践平台。
将该框架面向动态域中的感知与交互任务，强调其在复杂神经符号场景中的通用性。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于需要把感知结果与显式逻辑约束结合起来的推理学习场景，例如视觉问答、多目标跟踪以及动态交互环境中的决策问题。它要解决的是纯神经方法难以显式表达规则约束、纯符号方法又难以端到端学习的问题。
papers.title_en: Answer Set Programming Energised! End-to-End Neurosymbolic Reasoning and Learning with ASP and Energy Based Models

papers.title: Closing the Null Space: Guidance-Aware Quantization for Classifier-Free Diffusion
papers.abstract: Deploying classifier-free guidance (CFG) diffusion models under real-world compute budgets requires quantization, yet existing post-training quantization (PTQ) methods treat CFG models as single-branch networks, ignoring the paired conditional/unconditional structure that CFG inference fundamentally relies on. This structural blind spot has two consequences. At the system level, the two-pass CFG execution pattern imposes a latency overhead that parameter-count and bit-operation metrics conceal entirely, and commodity INT8 inference stacks fail to realize the theoretical efficiency gains that BOPs calculations promise. At the algorithmic level, calibrating against the guidance gap alone admits an exact null space: a quantized model can achieve perfect gap-fidelity diagnostics while the unconditional branch drifts arbitrarily, corrupting every guided prediction at inference time. This paper terms this the branch-drift trap, proves its existence analytically, and confirms it empirically through a false-positive result in which the best-calibrated model by standard diagnostics simultaneously produces the worst sample quality. To close the trap, Guidance-Aware Mixed Precision (GAMP) is proposed, which calibrates directly on the guided prediction, derives per-layer activation-bit sensitivity from guided-output degradation, and allocates bits via a greedy knapsack -- provably preventing unconditional branch drift by construction.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文研究无分类器引导（CFG）扩散模型在量化部署时的特殊问题，指出现有后训练量化方法把 CFG 当作单分支网络处理，忽略了条件分支与无条件分支的配对结构。作者证明仅校准 guidance gap 会留下一个精确的“零空间”，使模型即便在常规诊断上表现良好，也可能因为无条件分支漂移而在推理时生成质量变差。为此论文提出 GAMP，直接围绕引导后的预测进行校准和混合精度分配。
innovations: 指出并形式化分析了 CFG 量化中的 branch-drift trap，即只关注 guidance gap 会导致无条件分支漂移。
从系统角度强调 CFG 双遍执行带来的真实时延开销，说明参数量和 BOPs 指标无法完整反映部署效率。
提出 Guidance-Aware Mixed Precision（GAMP），直接基于引导后预测进行校准，而不是只约束分支差值。
基于引导输出退化来估计逐层激活比特敏感度，并用贪心背包策略分配比特预算。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于需要在有限算力预算下部署 CFG 扩散模型的场景，特别是图像生成模型做后训练量化时，希望兼顾推理效率与生成质量、避免条件/无条件双分支失配的问题。
papers.title_en: Closing the Null Space: Guidance-Aware Quantization for Classifier-Free Diffusion

papers.title: DeepPySR -- A Symbolic Regression Framework with Dynamic Pruning, Pareto Selection, and Hierarchical Composition for Real-World Scientific Discovery
papers.abstract: Symbolic regression (SR) discovers analytical equations from data, yielding glass-box models with directly interpretable formulas, unlike black-box methods that rely on unstable post-hoc tools such as SHAP or LIME. This transparency is crucial in clinical medicine and social science, but SR faces three challenges: high-dimensional inputs, principled selection of Pareto-front formulae, and data irregularities such as multicollinearity and class imbalance. We introduce DeepPySR, which addresses these issues with a dynamic variable-pruning schedule to remove irrelevant features during search, an exponential Pareto selection criterion that eliminates trade-offs between accuracy and complexity, and a multi-layer architecture for hierarchical symbolic composition. On four Feynman physics benchmarks and seven biomedical and social-science datasets, DeepPySR outperforms PySR and baselines on body fat (R$^2$: 0.794 vs.\ 0.702), heart disease (F1: 0.898 vs.\ 0.787), student performance (R$^2$: 0.964 vs.\ 0.948), and Raine BMI (R$^2$: 0.525 vs.\ 0.370), producing interpretable formulas aligned with domain risk factors.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出 DeepPySR，用于从数据中发现可解释的解析公式，以应对符号回归在真实数据中面临的高维输入、帕累托前沿公式选择以及多重共线性和类别不平衡等问题。方法通过动态变量剪枝在搜索过程中去除无关特征，并用指数型帕累托选择准则处理精度与复杂度之间的权衡。作者还引入多层结构以支持分层式符号组合，从而提升复杂现实任务中的表达能力与可解释性。
innovations: 提出动态变量剪枝日程，在符号回归搜索过程中逐步去除无关特征以适应高维输入。
提出指数型帕累托选择准则，用于更有原则地从精度与复杂度的候选公式集合中做选择。
设计多层架构以支持分层符号组合，增强对复杂现实规律的建模能力。
面向多重共线性、类别不平衡等真实数据问题，对符号回归在临床、社会科学等领域的适用性进行了强化。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于需要从数据中挖掘可解释公式的科学发现与高可解释建模场景，如物理规律发现、生物医学分析和社会科学建模，尤其适合不能只依赖黑箱模型事后解释的任务。
papers.title_en: DeepPySR -- A Symbolic Regression Framework with Dynamic Pruning, Pareto Selection, and Hierarchical Composition for Real-World Scientific Discovery

papers.title: Do You Need a Frontier Model as a Citation Verifier? Benchmarking Rubric LLMs for Deep-Research Source Attribution
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning increasingly relies on an LLM judge to score each rubric criterion, and that judge acts as the reward model during training. Before such a signal can be trusted, we need to know how capable the judge must be and how biased it is. We study this calibration question for citation quality in deep-research systems, where a search-grounded LLM must support each claim it writes with a cited source. Citation quality is a structured rubric task in which each attribution-citation pair is judged along two dimensions that require an LLM, source relevance and factual support. On an adversarial long-form benchmark, we score 8 off-the-shelf LLM judges from 3 model families against gold labels over 1,248 rubric decisions, all of which were human-reviewed and 378 of which were hard cases adjudicated from judge disagreements. Cheaper judges remain competitive across both dimensions, with GPT-5-mini attaining the strongest source-relevance pass-class F1 at 0.908 ($\kappa$=0.636), while on factual support the judges are statistically indistinguishable (overlapping confidence intervals), so no single model dominates. At comparable F1, the judges still differ substantially in pass-rate drift, false positive rate, and false negative rate. Scalar F1 obscures this directional bias, yet it is exactly what a downstream reinforcement learning loop would reinforce. Calibrating the judge is therefore a prerequisite for using citation rubrics as reward signals, and our results show that this calibration does not require the most expensive available model.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文研究深度研究系统中的引用质量评估，重点讨论作为奖励模型使用的 LLM judge 需要具备多强能力、又会带来什么偏差。作者把引用质量拆成来源相关性和事实支持两个维度，在一个对抗性的长文本基准上比较了多个现成模型。结果表明，更便宜的评审模型在部分维度上也能保持竞争力，但不同 judge 在通过率漂移、误报和漏报上存在显著差异，因此在用于强化学习前必须先做校准。
innovations: 把深度研究中的引用验证明确建模为结构化 rubric 任务，并拆解为来源相关性与事实支持两个维度。
系统比较多种现成 LLM judge，不只看整体分数，还分析方向性偏差对奖励建模的影响。
指出单一的 F1 指标会掩盖 judge 的通过率漂移、误报率和漏报率差异。
提出在把 citation rubric 作为强化学习奖励信号前，judge calibration 是必要前提。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于搜索增强生成、深度研究助手、长文本报告生成等需要“论断-引文”对齐验证的场景。它要解决的是：当 LLM judge 被直接用作奖励模型时，如果其偏差没有被校准，训练过程可能会强化错误的引用判断倾向。
papers.title_en: Do You Need a Frontier Model as a Citation Verifier? Benchmarking Rubric LLMs for Deep-Research Source Attribution

papers.title: Ideas Have Genomes: Benchmarking Scientific Lineage Reasoning and Lineage-Grounded Idea Generation
papers.abstract: Scientific ideas rarely start from a blank page. They inherit mechanisms, repair known limitations, and recombine pieces of earlier work, much like biological genomes. Current benchmarks still say little about whether AI systems can follow this inheritance structure. We present IdeaGene-Bench (IG-Bench), a benchmark for scientific lineage reasoning and lineage-grounded idea generation. IG-Bench is organized around the IdeaGene framework: each paper or proposal is represented as a set of minimal, typed, evidence-grounded Idea Genome objects, and a GenomeDiff aligns these objects to record inheritance, mutation, loss, external import, and novel insertion under six operational evolutionary dynamics. The benchmark contains 1,961 golden lineage traces, 1,085 curated Idea Genome objects, and 920 pairwise GenomeDiff records across 10 scientific domains. It supports two evaluations. IG-Exam (42 task types, 1,029 instances) tests closed-form lineage reasoning across Idea Genome abstraction, inheritance tracing, evolutionary reasoning, and lineage verification. IG-Arena evaluates generation with a lineage-conditioned Population-Evolution Score(PES), asking whether a proposal can be inserted as a coherent descendant of a given lineage population: it should inherit the right Idea Genome objects, vary meaningfully from nearby work, and offer selection value for future research. Experiments on 14 LLM-based scientists expose a compositional bottleneck. papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出 IdeaGene-Bench（IG-Bench），用于评测 AI 是否能够理解科学思想如何从既有工作中继承、变异、修补并重组。作者将论文或研究设想表示为带类型且有证据支撑的 Idea Genome 对象，并用 GenomeDiff 记录不同工作之间的继承与演化关系。基准同时覆盖封闭式谱系推理任务和基于谱系约束的创意生成评测，用来检验模型既能读懂研究脉络，也能提出与脉络一致的新想法。
innovations: 提出 IdeaGene 框架，把科学论文或研究提案抽象为最小化、类型化、证据锚定的 Idea Genome 对象。
设计 GenomeDiff 机制，用统一表示记录继承、变异、丢失、外部导入和新插入等演化关系。
构建同时支持谱系推理与谱系约束创意生成的综合基准，而不只是单一问答评测。
提出用于生成评测的谱系条件化 Population-Evolution Score，使新提案是否能作为既有研究谱系的连贯后代成为可评估目标。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向科研辅助、自动文献分析、研究创意生成与 AI scientist 系统评测等场景，解决现有模型难以理解研究工作之间继承关系与演化逻辑的问题。特别适用于需要沿着已有文献脉络追踪方法来源、比较思想变体，并生成与既有研究谱系一致的新研究设想的任务。
papers.title_en: Ideas Have Genomes: Benchmarking Scientific Lineage Reasoning and Lineage-Grounded Idea Generation

papers.title: Latent Memory Palace: Reasoning for Control as Autoregressive Variational Inference
papers.abstract: Human decision-making is highly flexible -- some actions are taken immediately; others require longer deliberation. Language models have exhibited a similar capacity for adaptive "reasoning." However, transferring this capability to continuous control policies has been challenging, as directly reasoning in language space may lack the granularity for spatial understanding and precise motions. In this work, we show that reasoning for control policies can emerge by organizing information in an autoregressive latent space reminiscent of a memory palace, where retrieval is iterative and adaptive. Our method, Latent Memory Palace (LMP), formulates reasoning as variational inference with an autoregressive latent distribution. We derive a latent-space reinforcement learning technique to tractably optimize its variational lower bound. The resulting policy, LMP-$\pi$, achieves strong empirical performance in simulation and real-world domains while exhibiting interpretable, adaptive allocation of test-time compute. We further show that the same framework yields a variable-length action tokenizer, LMP-$\texttt{tok}$, which significantly improves the performance of downstream autoregressive policies. Together, these results present a new perspective on latent reasoning for control through the lens of variational inference.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文研究如何把类似大模型“按需思考”的能力迁移到连续控制策略中。作者提出 Latent Memory Palace（LMP），在自回归潜在空间中组织和迭代检索信息，把控制中的推理建模为变分推断问题。基于这一框架，论文同时得到可进行自适应测试时计算分配的控制策略，以及可变长度的动作分词器，从而提升下游自回归策略的效果。
innovations: 提出 Latent Memory Palace，在潜在自回归空间中实现面向控制的迭代式、可适应推理。
将连续控制中的推理形式化为带自回归潜变量分布的变分推断问题。
推导出潜在空间强化学习方法，用于可处理地优化该框架的变分下界。
同一框架下进一步得到可变长度动作 tokenizer，服务于下游自回归控制策略。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向机器人控制、连续动作决策以及需要按任务复杂度动态分配测试时计算的控制场景，解决直接在语言空间推理难以支持精细空间理解和精确动作控制的问题。适用于仿真和真实世界中的复杂操作、长时序决策与自适应控制任务。
papers.title_en: Latent Memory Palace: Reasoning for Control as Autoregressive Variational Inference

papers.title: OPSD-V: On-Policy Self-Distillation for Post-Training Few-Step Autoregressive Video Generators
papers.abstract: We propose OPSD-V, an on-policy self-distillation paradigm for post-training few-step autoregressive (AR) video diffusion models. Existing few-step AR video generators can produce long videos with low latency, but still suffer from error accumulation and weakened motion dynamics during long autoregressive rollout. OPSD-V reduces long-horizon degradation while preserving the original few-step inference path. The key idea is to introduce real long-video data as temporal context during training and use it to provide dense trajectory-level supervision. Specifically, the student follows the exact inference-time rollout, generating each chunk conditioned on its own previously generated KV cache. In parallel, the teacher is evaluated at the same student-visited denoising states, but uses a cleaner AR-consistent temporal cache in which older history can be replaced by real-video context. This provides dense denoising-level corrective targets under on-policy AR cache dynamics, without changing the sampler, number of denoising steps, or inference-time cache mechanism. We apply OPSD-V to representative few-step AR video models, including Self-Forcing and LongLive. Experiments show consistent improvements in visual quality, motion dynamics, and VBenchLong scores. A user study with 10 participants comparing 20 video pairs shows that OPSD-V is preferred over the base models in 66.0% of overall-preference judgments (82.5% excluding ties).

papers.content_snippet: We propose OPSD-V, an on-policy self-distillation paradigm for post-training few-step autoregressive (AR) video diffusion models. Existing few-step AR video generators can produce long videos with low latency, but still suffer from error accumulation and weakened motion dynamics during long autoregressive rollout. OPSD-V reduces long-horizon degradation while preserving the original few-step inference path. The key idea is to introduce real long-video data as temporal context during training and use it to provide dense trajectory-level supervision. Specifically, the student follows the exact inference-time rollout, generating each chunk conditioned on its own previously generated KV cache. In parallel, the teacher is evaluated at the same student-visited denoising states, but uses a cleaner AR-consistent temporal cache in which older history can be replaced by real-video context. This provides dense denoising-level corrective targets under on-policy AR cache dynamics, without changing the sampler, number of denoising steps, or inference-time cache mechanism. We apply OPSD-V to representative few-step AR video models, including Self-Forcing and LongLive. Experiments show consistent improvements in visual quality, motion dynamics, and VBenchLong scores. A user study with 10 participants comparing 20 video pairs shows that OPSD-V is preferred over the base models in 66.0% of overall-preference judgments (82.5% excluding ties).

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出 OPSD-V，一种面向少步自回归视频扩散模型的后训练自蒸馏方法，用来缓解长程自回归生成中的误差累积和运动动态减弱问题。其核心做法是在训练时引入真实长视频作为时间上下文，让学生模型沿着与推理时一致的 rollout 轨迹生成，而教师模型在相同学生访问状态下提供更干净的纠正目标。该方法不改变采样器、去噪步数或推理时缓存机制，因此保持原有少步推理路径不变。
innovations: 提出面向少步自回归视频扩散模型的在策略自蒸馏范式，用于后训练提升长程生成稳定性。
让学生模型严格遵循推理时的自回归 rollout，并基于自身历史 KV cache 进行生成，使训练分布更贴近真实推理过程。
教师模型在相同学生访问的去噪状态上、结合更干净且自回归一致的时间缓存提供稠密纠正监督。
在不修改采样器、去噪步数和推理缓存机制的前提下，改善长视频生成中的视觉质量与运动动态。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于少步自回归视频生成模型需要在低延迟下生成更长视频的场景，尤其适合已经具备较快推理路径、但在长时程 rollout 中容易出现质量衰减和动作退化的视频生成系统。
papers.title_en: OPSD-V: On-Policy Self-Distillation for Post-Training Few-Step Autoregressive Video Generators

papers.title: Overthinking: Amplifying Reasoning Weights to Extract Learned Secrets
papers.abstract: Black box auditing of language models is an essential pre-deployment tool, but it may miss subtle forms of misalignment and hidden information. To better elicit hidden information during an auditing process, we introduce \emph{overthinking}: the process of using reasoning task vectors to amplify the propensity to think out loud of reasoning models. Given the parameters of a non-reasoning instruct model $M$ and reasoning-distilled model $R$, we define the \emph{overthinking model} as $\boldsymbol{\theta}_{\mathcal{O}_\alpha} = \boldsymbol{\theta}_{\mathcal{M}} + \alpha(\boldsymbol{\theta}_{\mathcal{R}} - \boldsymbol{\theta}_{\mathcal{M}})$, where $\alpha > 1$ amplifies reasoning beyond the pure reasoning model $R$. Additionally, we introduce new layer-wise attenuation strategies that selectively amplify reasoning without losing quality and coherence of model outputs. We demonstrate that overthinking models are more likely to reveal hidden information across four experimental settings, across 2B-32B models. Our findings suggest that reasoning amplification may surface secrets or unintended behaviors acquired during training up to $10\times$ more frequently than the original reasoning model. How secrets surface depends on the secret type: some require perturbation along the reasoning direction, while others yield to any sufficiently large weight perturbation.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文关注语言模型黑盒审计中隐藏信息和潜在失配行为难以被暴露的问题。作者提出 overthinking，通过沿“推理方向”放大模型参数中的推理成分，增强模型把内部信息显性化表达出来的倾向。论文还设计了分层衰减策略，以在尽量保持输出质量与连贯性的同时选择性放大推理，从而更容易诱发秘密泄露或异常行为暴露。
innovations: 提出 overthinking 方法，通过放大非推理模型与推理蒸馏模型之间的参数差方向来增强显式推理倾向。
给出 overthinking model 的参数化构造，把推理增强表述为对已有模型权重的定向外推。
提出新的逐层衰减策略，使推理放大更可控，减少输出质量和连贯性受损。
系统分析不同类型隐藏秘密的显现机制，指出有些秘密依赖推理方向扰动，有些则对大幅权重扰动普遍敏感。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向大模型安全评测、部署前黑盒审计、失配行为挖掘与敏感信息泄露风险分析等场景，解决标准审计流程可能难以触发隐蔽不安全行为的问题。适用于需要更激进地测试模型是否在训练中学到不应暴露内容的安全研究流程。
papers.title_en: Overthinking: Amplifying Reasoning Weights to Extract Learned Secrets

papers.title: Reaction-network reasoning with frontier models for experimentally confirmed catalyst-selectivity hypotheses
papers.abstract: Catalysts are essential for sustainable chemical manufacturing, yet discovering novel architectures remains a bottleneck dominated by trial-and-error experimentation and computationally intensive screening. In complex reactions such as electrochemical carbon dioxide reduction, product selectivity is governed by dynamic interfacial, electrolyte, and potential factors as well as kinetic pathway competition. Conventional descriptor-based machine learning and computational potentials struggle to resolve these mechanistic branch points, primarily relying on static ground-state descriptors or bulk structural correlations rather than end-to-end topological pathway analysis. Here, we show that frontier language models, when strictly constrained to reason over explicit reaction networks, can discover novel catalysts by identifying the physical levers that govern pathway competition. We developed a human-AI co-thinking framework that enforces network invariance to extract testable hypotheses from complex chemical graphs. Applied to CO2 electroreduction, the framework identified ketene desorption and hydroxide capture as the acetate-forming pathway, and predicted a distinct adsorbed CO and CH2 coupling route to ketene. By isolating actionable control levers, specifically local alkalinity, controlled iron incorporation, and restricted interfacial proton-donor accessibility, the framework guided the prospective synthesis of a copper-iron oxide catalyst demonstrating a threefold increase in acetate selectivity over matched Cu-rich baselines. This mechanism-guided reasoning architecture shifts the computational paradigm from retrospective statistical prediction to forward-looking hypothesis generation, providing a broadly applicable blueprint for mechanism-guided materials discovery.

papers.content_snippet: Catalysts are essential for sustainable chemical manufacturing, yet discovering novel architectures remains a bottleneck dominated by trial-and-error experimentation and computationally intensive screening. In complex reactions such as electrochemical carbon dioxide reduction, product selectivity is governed by dynamic interfacial, electrolyte, and potential factors as well as kinetic pathway competition. Conventional descriptor-based machine learning and computational potentials struggle to resolve these mechanistic branch points, primarily relying on static ground-state descriptors or bulk structural correlations rather than end-to-end topological pathway analysis. Here, we show that frontier language models, when strictly constrained to reason over explicit reaction networks, can discover novel catalysts by identifying the physical levers that govern pathway competition. We developed a human-AI co-thinking framework that enforces network invariance to extract testable hypotheses from complex chemical graphs. Applied to CO2 electroreduction, the framework identified ketene desorption and hydroxide capture as the acetate-forming pathway, and predicted a distinct adsorbed CO and CH2 coupling route to ketene. By isolating actionable control levers, specifically local alkalinity, controlled iron incorporation, and restricted interfacial proton-donor accessibility, the framework guided the prospective synthesis of a copper-iron oxide catalyst demonstrating a threefold increase in acetate selectivity over matched Cu-rich baselines. This mechanism-guided reasoning architecture shifts the computational paradigm from retrospective statistical prediction to forward-looking hypothesis generation, providing a broadly applicable blueprint for mechanism-guided materials discovery.
papers.title_zh: 利用前沿模型进行反应网络推理，以提出经实验验证的催化剂选择性假设

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文研究如何让前沿语言模型在明确反应网络约束下参与催化剂发现，而不是停留在静态描述符预测层面。作者提出一种 human-AI co-thinking 框架，让模型围绕显式反应网络进行推理，从复杂化学图中提取可实验检验的机理假设。以二氧化碳电还原为例，该方法识别出影响乙酸盐生成路径的关键机制与调控杠杆，并据此指导了铜铁氧化物催化剂的前瞻性合成。
innovations: 提出严格受显式反应网络约束的语言模型推理范式，把催化剂发现建立在端到端机理路径分析上。
设计 human-AI co-thinking 框架，并通过 network invariance 约束从复杂化学反应图中抽取可检验假设。
将模型输出从回顾式统计预测推进到前瞻式机理驱动假设生成，用于指导实验设计。
在 CO2 电还原任务中，把模型推理结果落实为可操作的调控杠杆，如局部碱性、铁掺入和界面质子供体可及性限制。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向催化剂发现、机理驱动材料设计和复杂化学反应路径分析场景，解决传统基于静态描述符或结构相关性的机器学习方法难以刻画竞争反应分支和选择性控制机制的问题。适用于需要把化学反应网络、机理假设与实验设计联动起来的科研流程。
papers.title_en: Reaction-network reasoning with frontier models for experimentally confirmed catalyst-selectivity hypotheses

papers.title: The Behavioural Reflection Test: A time-efficient measure of reflective reasoning in morally and epistemically charged decisions
papers.abstract: How readily people override intuitive conclusions through reflection shapes how they navigate dense information environments with reliable and misleading sources; yet the effectiveness of a prominent measure, the Cognitive Reflection Test (CRT), is eroded by widespread exposure to classic items and leaves open how such tendencies manifest more generally in decision style and linguistic expression. The Behavioural Reflection Test (BRT) addresses these issues with a brief open-ended measure of reasoning in morally and epistemically charged scenarios, alongside a four-item bespoke CRT (bCRT) as a low-exposure anchor. Among 473 online adults, higher bCRT predicted more evidence-sensitive, ethically driven decisions and reliance on high-quality sources, marked by more emotionally engaged, risk-attentive, economical language; associations the familiarity-adjusted CRT did not recover. The bCRT showed convergent validity, added item information above mean ability. Though open-ended, the BRT remained a time-efficient (median 11.8 minutes) behavioural assay of reflection with scope to extend across domains.

papers.title_zh: 行为反思测试：一种用于衡量道德与认知负载决策中反思性推理的高时效方法
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 该论文提出 Behavioural Reflection Test（BRT），用于衡量人在带有道德与认知压力情境中的反思性推理能力。作者指出，经典 Cognitive Reflection Test（CRT）因题目暴露过广而效力下降，因此又设计了一个低暴露的四题版 bCRT 作为参照。实验表明，更高的 bCRT 分数与更重视证据、更依赖高质量信息源、且更具伦理导向的决策相关，而熟悉度校正后的 CRT 未能恢复这些关联。
innovations: 提出开放式的 Behavioural Reflection Test（BRT），面向道德与认知负载场景下的反思性推理测量。
设计四题低暴露的 bespoke CRT（bCRT）作为锚点，缓解经典 CRT 因题目熟悉带来的测量退化。
不仅考察是否给出正确答案，还将决策风格、信息源选择与语言表达特征纳入反思性推理分析。
在保持开放式作答的同时，仍实现了较高时间效率，便于跨领域扩展。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于研究人在复杂信息环境中如何处理可靠与误导性信息，尤其适合分析道德判断、证据权衡、信息甄别与认知风格。可用于行为科学、人机交互、决策研究与信息素养评估场景。
papers.title_en: The Behavioural Reflection Test: A time-efficient measure of reflective reasoning in morally and epistemically charged decisions

papers.title: The Illusion of Equivalency: Statistical Characterization of Quantization Effects in LLMs
papers.abstract: Post-training quantization is widely used to deploy large language models in resource-constrained settings, yet its evaluation relies almost exclusively on accuracy and perplexity. We show that these metrics fail to capture behavioral changes induced by quantization. We introduce correctness agreement, a decision-level metric that measures overlap in correct predictions between a base model and its quantized variants, independent of absolute accuracy. Across multiple models and quantization schemes from 8-bit to 2-bit, we find that behavioral divergence emerges under moderate quantization even when task performance appears preserved. To explain this effect, we analyze quantization as a structural operator on attention weights and quantify layer-wise distortions using statistical and distributional measures. Our results reveal non-linear breakpoints at low bit-widths and show that query and key projections are consistently more sensitive than value and output projections. These findings expose an illusion of equivalence between base and quantized models and motivate behavioral evaluation beyond conventional performance metrics.
