papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文研究大语言模型后训练量化的评估问题，指出仅看准确率和困惑度会掩盖量化带来的行为变化。作者提出 correctness agreement，用于衡量原始模型与量化模型在“正确预测集合”上的重合程度，而不依赖绝对精度。论文还把量化视为作用于注意力权重的结构性扰动，分析不同层和不同投影在量化下的失真特征。
innovations: 提出 correctness agreement 这一决策层面的评估指标，用于刻画基座模型与量化模型在正确预测上的一致性。
从结构分析角度研究量化对注意力权重的影响，而不仅停留在最终任务指标比较。
结合统计与分布度量做分层失真分析，揭示低比特量化下存在非线性拐点。
发现 query 和 key 投影比 value 和 output 投影更敏感，给量化设计与诊断提供了更细粒度依据。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于大语言模型在资源受限环境中的部署评估，尤其适合需要比较不同量化位宽和量化方案是否真正保留模型行为的场景。它要解决的问题是：模型表面性能看似接近时，量化后内部决策行为可能已经发生明显偏移。
papers.title_en: The Illusion of Equivalency: Statistical Characterization of Quantization Effects in LLMs

papers.title: When Thinking Hurts: Epistemic Signals in the Reasoning Chains of Visual Language Models
papers.abstract: Uncertainty quantification for visual language models (VLMs) conventionally targets the answer token distribution. We provide the first three-family empirical characterisation of answer entropy behaviour in thinking-mode VLMs. Running four models on identical POPE adversarial samples, we find three qualitatively distinct patterns: Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking shows complete collapse (ans H AUROC = 0.492); GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking shows no collapse (0.716); and InternVL3-8B shows selective thinking (chains on only 50% of samples, ans H = 0.675 full / 0.602 thinking-only). Across all three thinking-mode models, thinking chain entropy outperforms answer entropy on the subset where chains are generated (0.647, 0.759, 0.608 vs. 0.492, 0.716, 0.602 respectively), suggesting chain signals are the more reliable predictor whenever chains are present. This holds strongly for Qwen and GLM, but with only marginal and statistically unreliable advantage for InternVL3 (n_FP = 17). A 300-sample VQAv2 pilot confirms chain entropy (0.680) outperforms answer entropy (0.595) on VQAv2 questions, with the gap largest for free-form answers (0.733 vs. 0.467). On harder reasoning tasks (HallusionBench) both Qwen models show moderate signal (approx. 0.64), consistent with incomplete pre-commitment on difficult questions. We additionally document structured abstention affecting 12-22% of queries with asymmetry toward absent-object queries, and a practical abstention gate raising accuracy from 71.0% to 93.8% at 62.7% coverage with no additional inference cost.
papers.institutions_raw: 作者单位待进一步解析
papers.content_snippet: Uncertainty quantification for visual language models (VLMs) conventionally targets the answer token distribution. We provide the first three-family empirical characterisation of answer entropy behaviour in thinking-mode VLMs. Running four models on identical POPE adversarial samples, we find three qualitatively distinct patterns: Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking shows complete collapse (ans H AUROC = 0.492); GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking shows no collapse (0.716); and InternVL3-8B shows selective thinking (chains on only 50% of samples, ans H = 0.675 full / 0.602 thinking-only). Across all three thinking-mode models, thinking chain entropy outperforms answer entropy on the subset where chains are generated (0.647, 0.759, 0.608 vs. 0.492, 0.716, 0.602 respectively), suggesting chain signals are the more reliable predictor whenever chains are present. This holds strongly for Qwen and GLM, but with only marginal and statistically unreliable advantage for InternVL3 (n_FP = 17). A 300-sample VQAv2 pilot confirms chain entropy (0.680) outperforms answer entropy (0.595) on VQAv2 questions, with the gap largest for free-form answers (0.733 vs. 0.467). On harder reasoning tasks (HallusionBench) both Qwen models show moderate signal (approx. 0.64), consistent with incomplete pre-commitment on difficult questions. We additionally document structured abstention affecting 12-22% of queries with asymmetry toward absent-object queries, and a practical abstention gate raising accuracy from 71.0% to 93.8% at 62.7% coverage with no additional inference cost.
papers.title_zh: 思考何以伤身：视觉语言模型推理链中的认知信号
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 该论文研究视觉语言模型在“思考模式”下，其推理链是否比最终答案分布更能反映模型的不确定性。作者比较了多类模型在相同样本上的表现，发现不同模型的答案熵行为差异显著，而在生成推理链的样本上，推理链熵通常比答案熵更能预测回答是否可靠。论文还分析了结构化弃答现象，并展示了一个无需额外推理成本的弃答门控策略。
innovations: 首次对三类 thinking-mode 视觉语言模型的答案熵行为进行系统经验刻画。
提出并验证推理链熵作为不确定性信号，在存在推理链时通常优于答案熵。
揭示不同模型存在“完全塌缩”“不塌缩”“选择性思考”等差异化行为模式。
分析结构化弃答现象，并给出可直接用于提升可靠性的实用弃答门控方案。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向视觉问答、幻觉检测和高风险多模态推理场景，解决“模型回答看似自信但不一定可靠”的问题。适用于需要不确定性估计、选择性回答、错误规避与安全部署的视觉语言模型系统。
papers.title_en: When Thinking Hurts: Epistemic Signals in the Reasoning Chains of Visual Language Models

papers.title: LightCrafter: PBR-Conditioned Video Diffusion Refinement for Controllable and Consistent Relighting
papers.abstract: Video relighting requires balancing long-form temporal consistency with a physically grounded understanding of light transport, which depends on accurate estimation of intrinsic scene properties such as materials, geometry, and illumination. Existing methods follow two paradigms: (1) reconstruct a video's photometric properties via inverse rendering and relight them to a target illumination via forward rendering, using physically-based rendering (PBR) or a neural renderer; these suffer from noisy reconstructions and struggle with hard-to-model effects such as global illumination. (2) Frame the task as generative video-to-video translation conditioned on relighting targets (a target environment map or text); this limits relighting control and temporal stability, since diffusion models struggle to translate long-form videos, and is constrained by the availability of input/relit training pairs. We propose LightCrafter, a hybrid pipeline that reformulates video relighting as video translation of a proxy video: rather than translating the input video directly to the target, we translate a PBR rendering of the input under the target illumination to the final target. This bakes illumination targets into the PBR proxy, removing the need to teach the diffusion model illumination concepts like environment maps, and enables more intricate lighting control while naturally providing long-form temporal consistency. We show PBR renders alone already outperform some prior art but struggle with effects like global illumination; to capture these, we leverage photometric priors in video generation models by post-training CogVideoX on synthetic video pairs and real-world unpaired videos. We outperform prior state-of-the-art on existing real-world relighting benchmarks and contribute a synthetic benchmark for further analysis. We will release our dataset, benchmark, metrics, and code.

papers.title_zh: LightCrafter：基于 PBR 条件的视频扩散细化方法，用于可控且一致的视频重照明
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 该论文提出 LightCrafter，用于在长视频中实现兼顾物理一致性与时间一致性的重照明。方法不是直接把原视频翻译到目标光照，而是先将输入视频在目标光照下做 PBR 渲染，得到代理视频，再由扩散模型将该代理视频细化为最终结果。作者还利用合成配对视频和真实无配对视频对 CogVideoX 进行后训练，以补足仅靠 PBR 难以处理的全局光照等复杂效应。
innovations: 提出“PBR 代理视频 + 扩散细化”的混合式视频重照明框架，而非直接对原视频做翻译。
将目标光照显式烘焙进 PBR 代理表示，减少扩散模型直接学习环境光照概念的负担。
利用视频生成模型的光度先验，通过合成配对与真实无配对视频后训练提升复杂光照效果建模能力。
同时贡献了用于分析的视频重照明合成基准、数据集、评测指标与代码发布计划。
papers.scenario_cn: 主要解决长视频重照明中“控制不精确、时间不稳定、物理效果不真实”的问题。适用于影视后期、视频编辑、虚拟拍摄、内容创作以及需要指定环境光照或文本控制光照风格的视频生成与重绘场景。
papers.title_en: LightCrafter: PBR-Conditioned Video Diffusion Refinement for Controllable and Consistent Relighting

papers.title: LongE2V: Long-Horizon Event-based Video Reconstruction, Prediction, and Frame Interpolation with Video Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Recovering high-quality video from sparse event streams is a challenging task. Regression methods often blur textures, while existing generative models struggle with long-term stability. We propose LongE2V, a novel approach that leverages pre-trained video diffusion priors to jointly handle event-based video reconstruction, prediction, and frame interpolation. By fine-tuning a foundational video model, our approach achieves high data efficiency and superior perceptual quality. We introduce Autoregressive Unrolling and Adaptive Context Switching to mitigate temporal drift in extremely long sequences. We also propose Reencoding Alignment with Cross Residual Correction to ensure precise bidirectional consistency during frame interpolation. Furthermore, Event Voxel Density Augmentation ensures robustness across varying sensor resolutions. Extensive experiments on real-world benchmarks demonstrate that LongE2V outperforms state-of-the-art methods across all three tasks, exhibiting exceptional temporal coherence and zero-shot generalization. Project page: this https URL

papers.title_zh: LongE2V：基于视频扩散模型的长时域事件视频重建、预测与帧插值
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 该论文提出 LongE2V，利用预训练视频扩散先验统一处理事件相机视频的重建、预测和帧插值。作者通过微调基础视频模型，在数据效率和感知质量上取得提升，并针对超长序列设计机制以缓解时间漂移。方法还加入双向对齐与残差校正以改进插帧一致性，并通过事件体素密度增强提升对不同传感器分辨率的鲁棒性。
innovations: 将预训练视频扩散模型统一用于事件视频重建、未来预测和帧插值三类任务。
提出 Autoregressive Unrolling 与 Adaptive Context Switching，以缓解超长序列中的时间漂移问题。
提出 Reencoding Alignment 与 Cross Residual Correction，提高帧插值时的双向一致性。
提出 Event Voxel Density Augmentation，增强方法对不同事件传感器分辨率的鲁棒性。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向事件相机视觉场景，解决稀疏事件流难以稳定恢复高质量长视频的问题。适用于高速运动、低延迟感知、机器人视觉、自动驾驶感知以及需要视频补帧和未来预测的事件相机应用。

papers.title: OpenCoF: Learning to Reason Through Video Generation
papers.abstract: Reasoning has become a core capability for large models, especially when reliable decisions require understanding logical consequences. Recent video generation models offer a reasoning path distinct from previous Chain-of-Thought (CoT): reasoning can unfold through temporally connected frames, known as Chain-of-Frame (CoF) reasoning. However, existing video generators are primarily trained on general video corpora, still lacking diverse supervision and dedicated designs for CoF reasoning. To address this gap, we introduce OpenCoF, a framework comprising the OpenCoF-17K dataset, a reasoning video dataset spanning 11 task families, and Wan-CoF, a fine-tuned video model for studying whether diverse temporal supervision improves CoF behavior. Across four video reasoning benchmarks, Wan-CoF achieves considerable gains over the Wan2.2-I2V-A14B baseline. Building on this, we empirically explore more advanced designs for CoF capabilities, i.e., equipping the model with visual and textual reasoning tokens. This mechanism respectively captures low-level visual cues and high-level semantic priors for spatial and temporal reasoning. Through performance comparisons and attention analysis, we examine how these tokens contribute across model depth, denoising steps, space, and time. Our results suggest that stronger video reasoning requires both broad temporal supervision and explicit mechanisms for organizing intermediate reasoning state. We open-source the dataset, model, and code to facilitate future research on reasoning-oriented video generation.

papers.institution: document.documentElement.classList.add('js'); [2607.08763] OpenCoF: Learning to Reason Through Video Generation Skip to main content arXiv is now an independent nonprofit! Learn more × Search Submit Donate Log in Search arXiv Press Enter to search · Advanced search --> Computer Science > Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition arXiv:2607.08763 (cs) [Submitted on 9 Jul 2026] Title: OpenCoF: Learning to Reason Through Video Generation Authors: Xinyan Chen , Ziyu Guo , Renrui Zhang , Dongzhi Jiang , Hongsheng Li View a PDF of the paper titled OpenCoF: Learning to Reason Through Video Generation, by Xinyan Chen and 4 other authors View PDF HTML (experimental) Abstract: Reasoning has become a core capability for large models, especially when reliable decisions require understanding logical consequences. Recent video generation models offer a reasoning path distinct from previous Chain-of-Thought (CoT): reasoning can unfold through temporally connected frames, known as Chain-of-Frame (CoF) reasoning. However, existing video generators are primarily trained on general video corpora, still lacking diverse supervision and dedicated designs for CoF reasoning. To address this gap, we introduce OpenCoF, a framework comprising the OpenCoF-17K dataset, a reasoning video dataset spanning 11 task families, and Wan-CoF, a fine-tuned video model for studying whether diverse temporal supervision improves CoF behavior. Across four video reasoning benchmarks, Wan-CoF achieves considerable gains over the Wan2.2-I2V-A14B baseline. Building on this, we empirically explore more advanced designs for CoF capabilities, i.e., equipping the model with visual and textual reasoning tokens. This mechanism respectively captures low-level visual cues and high-level semantic priors for spatial and temporal reasoning. Through performance comparisons and attention analysis, we examine how these tokens contribute across model depth, denoising steps, space, and time. Our results suggest that stronger video reasoning requires both broad temporal supervision and explicit mechanisms for organizing intermediate reasoning state. We open-source the dataset, model, and code to facilitate future research on reasoning-oriented video generation. papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出 OpenCoF 框架，研究视频生成模型是否能够通过时间连续的帧序列形成类似推理的“帧链式推理”（Chain-of-Frame, CoF）能力。作者构建了包含 11 类任务的 OpenCoF-17K 推理视频数据集，并基于此微调得到 Wan-CoF 模型。论文还进一步探索为模型加入视觉推理 token 和文本推理 token，以帮助模型组织空间与时间上的中间推理状态。
innovations: 提出面向视频推理的视频生成研究框架 OpenCoF，将推理过程建模为跨时间帧展开的 Chain-of-Frame。
构建 OpenCoF-17K 数据集，提供覆盖 11 个任务家族的多样化时序监督数据。
基于 Wan2.2-I2V-A14B 微调得到 Wan-CoF，用于系统评估丰富时序监督对视频推理行为的作用。
引入视觉推理 token 与文本推理 token，分别建模低层视觉线索和高层语义先验，以增强时空推理。
papers.scenario_cn: 主要解决现有视频生成模型虽然能生成连续画面，但缺乏显式时序推理能力的问题。适用于需要通过视频序列表达因果、时序变化或空间关系判断的生成式推理场景，以及面向视频推理能力研究的数据集和模型构建任务。
papers.title_en: OpenCoF: Learning to Reason Through Video Generation

papers.title: SAGA: Stable Acceleration Guidance for Autoregressive Video Generation
papers.abstract: Autoregressive video diffusion enables efficient streaming and long-horizon video generation, but repeatedly reusing generated latents as causal context can amplify temporal errors, resulting in flickering, motion jitter, and structural drift. In this paper, we investigate this failure mode from a spectral kinematic perspective and identify discrete latent acceleration as an effective signal for revealing unstable high-frequency temporal perturbations. To this end, we propose SAGA, a training-free \textbf{\textit{s}}table \textbf{\textit{a}}cceleration \textbf{\textit{g}}uidance approach for \textbf{\textit{a}}utoregressive video generation. SAGA integrates an acceleration domain spectral guidance objective based on finite-window Slepian projections with a structured autoregressive noise initialization strategy that suppresses short-range temporal correlations while preserving long-range motion structure. Without retraining or modifying the backbone, SAGA can be directly applied to existing chunk-wise autoregressive diffusion models, which is the prevalent setting for high-quality generation. Extensive experiments show that SAGA consistently improves temporal quality across multiple autoregressive diffusion models. On Self-Forcing, SAGA improves Temporal Quality from 97.30 to 97.91 and Image Quality from 69.60 to 70.51. Moreover, spectral analysis and human preference studies demonstrate that SAGA reduces temporal instability while maintaining visual fidelity.

papers.content_snippet: Autoregressive video diffusion enables efficient streaming and long-horizon video generation, but repeatedly reusing generated latents as causal context can amplify temporal errors, resulting in flickering, motion jitter, and structural drift. In this paper, we investigate this failure mode from a spectral kinematic perspective and identify discrete latent acceleration as an effective signal for revealing unstable high-frequency temporal perturbations. To this end, we propose SAGA, a training-free \textbf{\textit{s}}table \textbf{\textit{a}}cceleration \textbf{\textit{g}}uidance approach for \textbf{\textit{a}}utoregressive video generation. SAGA integrates an acceleration domain spectral guidance objective based on finite-window Slepian projections with a structured autoregressive noise initialization strategy that suppresses short-range temporal correlations while preserving long-range motion structure. Without retraining or modifying the backbone, SAGA can be directly applied to existing chunk-wise autoregressive diffusion models, which is the prevalent setting for high-quality generation. Extensive experiments show that SAGA consistently improves temporal quality across multiple autoregressive diffusion models. On Self-Forcing, SAGA improves Temporal Quality from 97.30 to 97.91 and Image Quality from 69.60 to 70.51. Moreover, spectral analysis and human preference studies demonstrate that SAGA reduces temporal instability while maintaining visual fidelity.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文关注自回归视频扩散模型在长时生成中出现的闪烁、运动抖动和结构漂移问题。作者从频谱运动学视角分析误差传播机制，提出无需训练的 SAGA 方法，用离散潜变量加速度来识别不稳定的高频时序扰动。该方法结合加速度域频谱引导目标与结构化自回归噪声初始化，可直接应用到现有分块式自回归扩散模型上。
innovations: 从频谱运动学角度分析自回归视频生成中的时间不稳定性，并提出用离散潜变量加速度作为关键诊断信号。
提出训练自由的 SAGA 引导方法，无需修改或重训主干模型即可提升时序稳定性。
设计基于有限窗口 Slepian 投影的加速度域频谱引导目标，抑制高频时间扰动。
提出结构化自回归噪声初始化策略，在抑制短程时间相关性的同时保留长程运动结构。
papers.scenario_cn: 主要解决自回归视频扩散模型在连续生成时因重复使用历史 latent 而导致的时序误差累积问题。适用于流式视频生成、长时视频生成，以及各类采用 chunk-wise 自回归扩散范式的视频生成系统。
papers.title_en: SAGA: Stable Acceleration Guidance for Autoregressive Video Generation

papers.title: An Iterative Method for Transient Finite Element Simulations of Non-Linear Eddy Current Problems
papers.abstract: A method is presented to carry out a transient simulation of eddy current problems with nonlinear materials. Coils are voltage-driven. The magnetic field due to currents in coils are considered by their Biot-Savart-fields. The magnetic vector potential is used in the finite element formulation. The time stepping method is based on implicit Euler. The arising nonlinear equation system is split into two parts, the common finite element system and a circuit equation. Each part is solved separately by Newton's method. Additionally, a line search is used to solve the nonlinear field equations. Inrush currents and average magnetic flux densities through cross sections of laminates of a nonlinear benchmark problem consisting of a laminated iron core inserted in a cylindrical coil are studied. All details of the numerical benchmark are given to evaluate the presented results. Numerical data describing the performance of the presented method are provided.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出一种针对非线性材料涡流问题的瞬态仿真方法，面向电压驱动线圈场景进行有限元求解。方法采用磁矢势形式和隐式欧拉时间推进，并将非线性方程组拆分为有限元场方程与电路方程两部分分别求解。作者还结合 Newton 方法与线搜索策略，对一个含叠片铁芯与圆柱线圈的基准问题进行了验证。
innovations: 提出面向非线性涡流瞬态仿真的迭代求解框架，适配电压驱动线圈场景。
将非线性方程系统拆分为有限元系统与电路方程两部分，并分别使用 Newton 方法求解。
在线性化求解过程中引入线搜索机制，以改进非线性场方程的求解稳定性。
给出完整数值基准与性能数据，便于后续方法复现和对比。
papers.scenario_cn: 主要解决非线性材料参与下的瞬态涡流有限元仿真问题，尤其是场路耦合求解复杂、非线性强的问题。适用于电磁器件设计、含铁芯线圈分析、浪涌电流研究以及叠片结构磁通密度评估等工程仿真场景。
papers.title_en: An Iterative Method for Transient Finite Element Simulations of Non-Linear Eddy Current Problems

papers.title: HoloTetSphere: Unified TetSphere Mesh Reconstruction for Physical Simulations
papers.abstract: Standard pipelines for physics-ready 3D reconstruction rely on a decoupled two-stage paradigm: extracting surface geometry followed by an error-prone tetrahedralization process. While recent Lagrangian methods like TetSphere Splatting attempt to bypass this by directly optimizing volumetric primitives, their homeomorphic constraints prevent topology-adaptive optimization. Consequently, they produce disjoint tetrahedra rather than a single connected mesh, rendering the structures unsuitable for further physical simulations. To address this, we propose a topology-adaptive framework for holistic tetrahedral mesh reconstruction through end-to-end topological and geometric optimization. First, by coupling Gaussian spheres to tetrahedral elements and leveraging edge connections, we estimate a continuous opacity field for differentiable element pruning. Next, jointly minimizing mesh smoothing energy and multi-view Gaussian rendering error drives alternating geometric refinement while preserving topological adaptivity. Consequently, our approach effectively constructs a unified and topologically coherent tetrahedral mesh. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art techniques by achieving superior geometric accuracy and producing coherent, single-connected tetrahedral meshes, thereby effectively bypassing the error-prone conventional tetrahedralization step for reconstructed surface meshes and streamlining downstream physical simulation.

papers.content_snippet: Standard pipelines for physics-ready 3D reconstruction rely on a decoupled two-stage paradigm: extracting surface geometry followed by an error-prone tetrahedralization process. While recent Lagrangian methods like TetSphere Splatting attempt to bypass this by directly optimizing volumetric primitives, their homeomorphic constraints prevent topology-adaptive optimization. Consequently, they produce disjoint tetrahedra rather than a single connected mesh, rendering the structures unsuitable for further physical simulations. To address this, we propose a topology-adaptive framework for holistic tetrahedral mesh reconstruction through end-to-end topological and geometric optimization. First, by coupling Gaussian spheres to tetrahedral elements and leveraging edge connections, we estimate a continuous opacity field for differentiable element pruning. Next, jointly minimizing mesh smoothing energy and multi-view Gaussian rendering error drives alternating geometric refinement while preserving topological adaptivity. Consequently, our approach effectively constructs a unified and topologically coherent tetrahedral mesh. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art techniques by achieving superior geometric accuracy and producing coherent, single-connected tetrahedral meshes, thereby effectively bypassing the error-prone conventional tetrahedralization step for reconstructed surface meshes and streamlining downstream physical simulation.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文针对面向物理仿真的三维重建流程中“先重建表面、再四面体化”的两阶段范式容易出错的问题，提出 HoloTetSphere。该方法通过端到端的拓扑与几何联合优化，直接重建统一且拓扑连贯的四面体网格。核心做法是将 Gaussian spheres 与四面体单元耦合，结合可微裁剪和交替几何优化，从而生成适合下游物理仿真的单连通体网格。
innovations: 提出面向物理仿真的整体式四面体网格重建框架，避免传统表面重建后再四面体化的误差累积。
通过将 Gaussian spheres 与四面体单元耦合，并利用边连接估计连续不透明度场，实现可微的单元裁剪。
联合最小化网格平滑能量与多视角 Gaussian 渲染误差，在保持拓扑自适应的同时进行几何细化。
生成统一、拓扑一致、单连通的四面体网格，更适合直接进入下游物理仿真流程。
papers.scenario_cn: 主要解决现有 physics-ready 3D reconstruction 流程中网格不连通、拓扑不一致、难以直接用于物理仿真的问题。适用于需要从多视角观测直接构建可仿真体网格的场景，如形变模拟、碰撞分析及其他基于四面体网格的物理仿真任务。
papers.title_en: HoloTetSphere: Unified TetSphere Mesh Reconstruction for Physical Simulations

papers.title: PGD-NO: A Neural Operator with Precomputed Geometry Decomposition for 3D Million-scale Physics Simulations
papers.abstract: While neural PDE solvers have demonstrated significant potential for accelerating engineering simulations, existing architectures remain constrained by high memory consumption and the single node bottleneck, where the maximum processable mesh resolution is strictly limited by the VRAM of a single compute unit. To address these challenges, we propose PGD-NO, a neural operator with Precomputed Geometry Decomposition, that relocates the computational overhead of geometric encoding to a deterministic pre-computation phase. By utilizing an iterative geometry decomposition algorithm to extract geometry tokens, our model decouples feature extraction from solution querying. This architecture enables linear memory scalability, allowing high fidelity learning on meshes exceeding 10 million nodes, a scale where existing architectures typically encounter memory exhaustion. PGD-NO demonstrates competitive predictive accuracy across diverse industrial benchmarks and provides intrinsic interpretability through attention mechanisms. By effectively overcoming traditional mesh-size constraints, PGD-NO offers a robust and efficient solution for the next generation of large-scale, high-fidelity industrial design applications.

papers.summary_cn: 该论文提出 PGD-NO，一种面向大规模三维物理仿真的神经算子，旨在缓解现有神经 PDE 求解器在高分辨率网格下的显存与单节点瓶颈问题。其核心做法是将几何编码的主要计算负担前移到确定性的预计算阶段，通过迭代几何分解提取几何 token。这样可将特征提取与解查询解耦，从而支持在超大规模网格上进行高保真学习。论文还指出该方法在多个工业基准上具有有竞争力的预测精度，并具备一定注意力可解释性。
innovations: 提出 Precomputed Geometry Decomposition 机制，将几何编码开销转移到预计算阶段，降低在线求解时的负担。
通过迭代式几何分解提取 geometry tokens，实现特征提取与解查询的解耦。
设计出具有线性内存可扩展性的神经算子架构，以突破单计算单元显存限制。
在保持预测精度的同时，引入基于注意力的内在可解释性。
papers.scenario_cn: 该方法主要解决神经 PDE 求解器在超大三维网格上因显存和单节点容量受限而难以扩展的问题，适用于高保真工程仿真、工业设计分析以及大规模物理场近似求解等场景。
papers.title_en: PGD-NO: A Neural Operator with Precomputed Geometry Decomposition for 3D Million-scale Physics Simulations

papers.title: Write-Protected Discrete Bottlenecks for Language-Grounded World Models: A Structural Limitation and Sufficient Fix
papers.abstract: How should language interface with a world model's discrete symbol system? The dominant paradigm -- end-to-end injection of LLM/VLM features into robot world models (RT-2, Octo, PaLM-E) -- implicitly assumes that language gradients can directly shape physical symbol representations. We ask whether this assumption is safe, find that it is not, and characterize the minimal architectural constraint that prevents the failure. Any language gradient entering a Gumbel-softmax-based discrete symbol bottleneck forces a structural trade-off: the vanilla estimator collapses to 2.2/64 symbols (4/5 seeds), while five anti-collapse strategies maintain diversity but fail to learn semantic labels (all <= 9.2% accuracy). No tested GumbelBottleneck variant achieves both objectives simultaneously. Within this family of discrete bottlenecks, the failure is structural rather than a matter of optimization. We characterize a sufficient set of three constraints that prevent the failure: (1) cut the gradient chain ( this http URL ()), preventing language signals from reaching the symbol bottleneck; (2) provide a gradient-free semantic channel -- a non-parametric Memory Table (Dict[symbol -> Counter[label]], zero parameters, zero gradients) where co-occurrence counting replaces gradient-based binding; (3) handle symbol collisions via DP-Means streaming clustering for automatic sub-cluster splitting. All three layers together achieve 97.2% grounding accuracy vs. 22.2% without Layer 3. Across two experiments spanning 74 independent runs, we demonstrate zero symbol collapse in all 32 seeds, with the blackboard achieving 79-100% semantic binding across three encoder architectures (CNN, V-JEPA 300M, CLIP ViT-L), two environments, and three texture conditions. The fix trains fewer than 2M parameters and requires no LLM fine-tuning.

Learn more × Search Submit Donate Log in Search arXiv Press Enter to search · Advanced search --> Computer Science > Machine Learning arXiv:2607.08312 (cs) [Submitted on 9 Jul 2026] Title: Write-Protected Discrete Bottlenecks for Language-Grounded World Models: A Structural Limitation and Sufficient Fix Authors: Jiayi Fang View a PDF of the paper titled Write-Protected Discrete Bottlenecks for Language-Grounded World Models: A Structural Limitation and Sufficient Fix, by Jiayi Fang View PDF HTML (experimental) Abstract: How should language interface with a world model's discrete symbol system? The dominant paradigm -- end-to-end injection of LLM/VLM features into robot world models (RT-2, Octo, PaLM-E) -- implicitly assumes that language gradients can directly shape physical symbol representations. We ask whether this assumption is safe, find that it is not, and characterize the minimal architectural constraint that prevents the failure. Any language gradient entering a Gumbel-softmax-based discrete symbol bottleneck forces a structural trade-off: the vanilla estimator collapses to 2.2/64 symbols (4/5 seeds), while five anti-collapse strategies maintain diversity but fail to learn semantic labels (all <= 9.2% accuracy). No tested GumbelBottleneck variant achieves both objectives simultaneously. Within this family of discrete bottlenecks, the failure is structural rather than a matter of optimization. We characterize a sufficient set of three constraints that prevent the failure: (1) cut the gradient chain ( this http URL ()), preventing language signals from reaching the symbol bottleneck; (2) provide a gradient-free semantic channel -- a non-parametric Memory Table (Dict[symbol -> Counter[label]], zero parameters, zero gradients) where co-occurrence counting replaces gradient-based binding; (3) handle symbol collisions via DP-Means streaming clustering for automatic sub-cluster splitting. All three layers together achieve 97.2% grounding accuracy vs. 22.2% without Layer 3. Across two experiments spanning 74 independent runs, we demonstrate zero symbol collapse in all 32 seeds, with the blackboard achieving 79-100% semantic binding across three encoder architectures (CNN, V-JEPA 300M, CLIP ViT-L), two environments, and three texture conditions. The fix trains fewer than 2M parameters and requires no LLM fine-tuning. Comments: 20 pages, 7 figures. papers.summary_cn: 该论文研究语言应如何与世界模型中的离散符号系统交互，指出将语言梯度直接注入基于 Gumbel-softmax 的离散符号瓶颈会带来结构性失败。作者发现，这类方法会在“符号多样性保持”和“语义标签学习”之间形成难以兼得的矛盾。为此，论文提出一组充分约束：切断语言梯度链、引入无梯度语义通道，以及用流式聚类处理符号碰撞。该修复方案在不同编码器和环境下实现了稳定的语义绑定，并避免了符号坍塌。
innovations: 提出对语言驱动离散符号瓶颈的结构性失败分析，认为问题并非单纯来自优化困难，而是架构层面的限制。
给出一组充分修复约束，包括切断语言梯度进入离散瓶颈、使用无参数无梯度的 Memory Table 进行语义绑定。
引入基于 DP-Means 的流式聚类机制，用于自动拆分发生碰撞的符号子簇。
在无需 LLM 微调、参数量较小的前提下，实现语言锚定与符号稳定性的兼顾。
papers.scenario_cn: 该方法主要解决机器人或具身智能世界模型中，语言信号直接塑造离散物理符号表示时导致的符号坍塌与语义绑定失败问题，适用于语言条件控制、具身感知建模、机器人世界模型与语言 grounding 系统。
papers.title_en: Write-Protected Discrete Bottlenecks for Language-Grounded World Models: A Structural Limitation and Sufficient Fix

papers.title: BACH: A Bayesian Admixture of Contrastive Heads for Multi-Interest Two-Tower Retrieval
papers.abstract: Two-tower retrievers compress each user into a single embedding, limiting their ability to serve diverse interests. Multi-interest models give each user several heads scored by a maximum inner product, but their hard-routing training under-utilizes heads (routing collapse) and gives no per-user estimate of how much each interest matters for serving. We present \textbf{BACH} (\emph{Bayesian Admixture of Contrastive Heads}), which casts multi-interest two-tower retrieval as a per-user mixture over the heads, fit by variational inference. The soft mixture trains every head (mitigating collapse), produces a per-user weighting of the interests that is reused at serving, and admits a shared global-codebook variant with precomputable retrieval. On three large-scale benchmarks, MovieLens-20M, Taobao, and Netflix, BACH improves top-of-ranking retrieval over hard-routing multi-interest and single-vector baselines at every head count; we further find that scoring every candidate by its best head, consistent with serving, outperforms the usual target-routed training, and that BACH improves further still.

papers.summary_cn: 该论文针对双塔检索模型将每个用户压缩为单一向量、难以表达多样兴趣的问题，提出多兴趣检索方法 BACH。它将用户的多个兴趣头建模为按用户变化的混合分布，并通过变分推断进行学习，而不是采用容易导致路由坍塌的硬路由训练。这样不仅能更充分地训练各个兴趣头，还能得到可直接用于在线服务的用户级兴趣权重。论文还提出共享全局码本变体，以支持可预计算的检索流程。
innovations: 将多兴趣双塔检索形式化为用户层面的贝叶斯混合模型，用变分推断学习各兴趣头权重。
以软混合替代硬路由训练，缓解多兴趣检索中的 head/routing collapse 问题。
学习得到的用户级兴趣权重可直接复用于服务阶段，使训练目标与推理行为更一致。
提出共享全局码本变体，为高效预计算检索提供可能。
papers.scenario_cn: 该方法主要解决推荐与搜索检索中用户兴趣多样、单一用户向量表达不足的问题，适用于双塔召回、多兴趣推荐、个性化搜索以及需要兼顾效率与兴趣覆盖的工业级检索场景。
papers.title_en: BACH: A Bayesian Admixture of Contrastive Heads for Multi-Interest Two-Tower Retrieval

papers.title: Bug Report Specification Refinement with Trajectory Guidance for Automated Program Repair
papers.abstract: Bug reports serve as task specifications for repository-level automated program repair (APR) agents, but they often describe only the observed failure and omit repair-relevant information such as the failure-inducing behavior, behavioral requirement, and implementation scope. As a result, a repair agent may inspect irrelevant code, infer an incorrect requirement, or generate a patch that addresses the reported symptom without restoring the intended repository behavior. We present TrajSpec, a trajectory-guided approach for repository-supported bug report specification refinement. Given an original report and a pre-fix repository, TrajSpec runs a trajectory-collection agent and uses the resulting unverified trajectory as a source of trajectory-derived specification evidence. It organizes this evidence into a three-level representation consisting of a high-level interpretation of the issue, diagnostic findings supporting that interpretation, and concrete repository observations. TrajSpec then generates a draft refined report and applies repository-based review to remove unsupported claims, revise uncertain claims, and add repository-supported details. We evaluate TrajSpec on all 300 SWE-Bench Lite instances using Mini-SWE-Agent V2. TrajSpec's refined reports improve Pass@1 from 41.00% to 59.67% with GPT-5-mini and from 54.67% to 64.33% with MiniMax M2.5. On a stratified sample of 100 instances, TrajSpec's refined reports also improve Pass@1 from 41.00% to 71.00% with Agentless and from 47.00% to 72.00% with AutoCodeRover. Ablation results show that removing repository-based review or the hierarchical evidence representation reduces Pass@1 from 59.67% to 48.00% and 47.67%, respectively. Overall, TrajSpec provides actionable repository-supported context that consistently improves repair performance.

On a stratified sample of 100 instances, TrajSpec's refined reports also improve Pass@1 from 41.00% to 71.00% with Agentless and from 47.00% to 72.00% with AutoCodeRover. Ablation results show that removing repository-based review or the hierarchical evidence representation reduces Pass@1 from 59.67% to 48.00% and 47.67%, respectively. Overall, TrajSpec provides actionable repository-supported context that consistently improves repair performance.
papers.title_zh: 面向自动化程序修复的基于轨迹引导的缺陷报告规格细化
papers.institution: 作者单位待进一步解析
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文关注仓库级自动化程序修复中，缺陷报告常常只描述表面故障、缺少修复所需约束信息的问题。作者提出 TrajSpec：先在修复前代码仓上运行轨迹收集代理，提取与问题相关的轨迹证据，再将这些证据组织成分层表示，用于生成更完整的细化缺陷报告。随后，方法还会通过基于仓库的复核去删除无依据表述、修正不确定判断，并补充有代码依据的细节。实验表明，这类细化后的报告能稳定提升多个 APR agent 的修复成功率。
innovations: 提出 TrajSpec，通过问题求解轨迹为原始缺陷报告补充修复相关的规格信息，而不是直接依赖原始报告做修复。
构建三层证据表示，将问题的高层解释、支撑性的诊断发现以及具体仓库观察分层组织，增强规格表达的可用性。
在生成细化报告后加入基于仓库的复核流程，用于删除缺乏证据的陈述、修订不确定内容并补充有依据的细节。
将“规格细化”作为独立前置环节来提升不同自动化修复代理的效果，体现出较好的方法通用性。
papers.scenario_cn: 该方法面向仓库级自动化程序修复场景，解决的是原始 bug report 信息不足、导致修复代理查看无关代码、误判需求或只修表象不恢复真实行为的问题。适用于 SWE-bench 一类软件工程代理、代码修复代理以及需要从自然语言缺陷描述恢复真实程序行为的自动修复流程。
papers.title_en: Bug Report Specification Refinement with Trajectory Guidance for Automated Program Repair

papers.title: DaV-Gen: End-to-End Generative Retrieval via Draft-and-Verify
papers.abstract: Mainstream industrial information retrieval systems (e.g., search and recommendation) are usually built upon Multi-Stage Cascade Architectures (MCAs), which balance effectiveness and efficiency through a coarse-to-fine ``retrieval-ranking'' pipeline. However, the optimization objectives across different stages are substantially inconsistent, propagating or even amplifying the early-stage errors that ultimately degrade the quality of final results. While emerging end-to-end generative models offer a potential solution by unifying the pipeline, their online serving performance is severely hindered by the auto-regressive process inherited from the standard decoder-only structure. To bridge this gap, we introduce \textbf{DaV-Gen}, a novel unified solution designed to fundamentally refactor the paradigm for both search and recommendation via a ``Draft-and-Verify'' mechanism. Inspired by the process used by speculative decoding, our framework redesigns the generation task into two synergistic operations within a single model. During training, the model is concurrently optimized for both candidate drafting and fine-grained verification. This is achieved by a composite loss function that jointly trains the model on two distinct but related objectives: 1) a contrastive loss that structures the embedding space for efficient drafting, and 2) a fusion loss that combines generative likelihood with vector similarity to produce a superior verification score. This integrated training strategy equips the model with dual capabilities. At inference time, it first performs highly efficient vector-based drafting to generate a candidate set, and then verifies these candidates using the more powerful fused scoring function, thereby achieving both the speed of sparse drafting and the precision of advanced generative models within a unified, end-to-end architecture.

papers.summary_cn: 该论文提出 DaV-Gen，旨在用统一的端到端生成式框架替代传统检索-排序多阶段级联架构，以缓解不同阶段目标不一致带来的误差传递问题。作者借鉴 speculative decoding 的思想，将检索过程重构为“起草”和“验证”两个协同操作，并在单模型内联合训练。训练时同时使用对比损失和融合损失，使模型既能高效生成候选，也能进行更细粒度的候选验证。推理时先进行向量式高效起草，再用融合评分做验证，从而兼顾效率与效果。
innovations: 提出统一的 Draft-and-Verify 生成式检索框架，在单模型内整合候选生成与精排验证。
借鉴 speculative decoding 思路，将生成式检索拆解为高效起草与高精度验证两个互补阶段。
设计联合训练目标，同时包含用于高效候选构建的对比损失和结合生成似然与向量相似度的融合损失。
在推理阶段采用先向量起草、后融合验证的机制，缓解标准自回归生成在线服务过慢的问题。
papers.scenario_cn: 该方法主要解决搜索和推荐系统中多阶段级联架构目标不一致、早期误差放大，以及纯生成式检索在线推理效率不足的问题，适用于工业搜索、推荐召回与排序一体化、端到端信息检索等场景。
papers.title_en: DaV-Gen: End-to-End Generative Retrieval via Draft-and-Verify

papers.title: Decomposition-Based QAOA for Maximum Coverage Location Problem in Satellite Constellation Design
papers.abstract: An increase in earth observation missions has increased the demand of efficient design and optimization of satellite constellations. Maximizing coverage of the target while effectively utilizing the limited orbital resources is one of the critical design challenges for complex combinatorial optimization problems. The maximal covering location problem (MCLP), serves as a base for orbital coverage modeling, is NP-hard and computationally intractable for large-constellation instances. Using heuristics, metaheuristics, and mixed-integer linear programming, classical solvers have achieved optimal or near-optimal results, yet their scalability is limited as the problem size increases. Quantum computing advancements, including the quantum approximate optimization algorithms, offer a potential solution to NP-hard combinatorial optimization problems. Current quantum hardware limitations, such as low qubit counts and circuit depth, restrict solutions for small-scale instance problems. To address this challenge, this paper proposes a scalable quantum optimization framework for MCLP in satellite constellation design. A decomposition-based quantum methodology is proposed, in which large MCLP instances are partitioned into subgraphs by classical decomposition, optimized independently via quantum optimization circuits, and combined using quantum reconstruction strategies. Computational results across different constellation sizes reveal better scalability in less time while maintaining competitive coverage performance compared to classical solvers.

papers.title_zh: 面向卫星星座设计中最大覆盖选址问题的基于分解的 QAOA
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 该论文关注卫星星座设计中的最大覆盖选址问题，将其视为复杂的 NP-hard 组合优化任务。作者提出一种可扩展的量子优化框架，先用经典分解方法把大规模问题切分为多个子图，再分别通过量子优化电路求解，最后用量子重构策略合并结果。摘要表明，该方法在不同规模星座实例上能在保持有竞争力覆盖效果的同时，展现更好的可扩展性和更短的求解时间。
innovations: 提出面向卫星星座最大覆盖选址问题的分解式量子优化框架。
将大规模 MCLP 实例先做经典分解，再对子问题独立进行量子优化。
设计了对子问题结果进行整合的量子重构策略。
面向当前量子硬件比特数和电路深度受限的现实条件，强调方法的可扩展求解能力。
papers.scenario_cn: 解决卫星星座设计中在有限轨道资源下最大化目标覆盖的问题，适用于地球观测任务、卫星布设优化以及其他可抽象为大规模覆盖选址的组合优化场景。
papers.title_en: Decomposition-Based QAOA for Maximum Coverage Location Problem in Satellite Constellation Design

papers.title: Domination and Coverage Problems under Vulnerability Constraints
papers.abstract: In various domination and coverage problems, certain vertices or edges should not be dominated/covered and are designated as vulnerable. Motivated by this, we define the $k$-Vertex Maximum Domination Ratio with Vulnerable Vertices $(k\textit{-}Max \ \mathit{DRVV})$ problem, which extends the budgeted dominating set problem to include vulnerability constraints. We propose an approximation algorithm based on an unbudgeted variant of $k\textit{-}Max \ \mathit{DRVV}$, termed the Maximum Domination Ratio with Vulnerable Vertices $(\mathit{DRVV})$ problem. For bounded-degree graphs of order $n$, our algorithm provides an $O(k/n)$-approximation for the $k\textit{-}Max \ \mathit{DRVV}$ problem. We introduce the Dominating Set with Vulnerable Vertices $(\mathit{DSV})$ problem, reduce it to the Red-Blue Set Cover problem, and derive a $2\sqrt{|V|\cdot(H(\Delta_{N})-\frac{1}{2}})$-approximation algorithm, where $|V|$ is the order of the graph, $\Delta_N$ is the maximum degree among non-vulnerable vertices and $H$ is the harmonic function. Finally, we examine the Vertex Cover with Vulnerable Edges $(\mathit{VCVE})$ problem, which can be naturally expressed as a special case of the Red-Blue Set Cover problem. We present a polynomial-time $2$-approximation algorithm for the $VCVE$ problem, achieving the best possible ratio.

For bounded-degree graphs of order $n$, our algorithm provides an $O(k/n)$-approximation for the $k\textit{-}Max \ \mathit{DRVV}$ problem. We introduce the Dominating Set with Vulnerable Vertices $(\mathit{DSV})$ problem, reduce it to the Red-Blue Set Cover problem, and derive a $2\sqrt{|V|\cdot(H(\Delta_{N})-\frac{1}{2}})$-approximation algorithm, where $|V|$ is the order of the graph, $\Delta_N$ is the maximum degree among non-vulnerable vertices and $H$ is the harmonic function. Finally, we examine the Vertex Cover with Vulnerable Edges $(\mathit{VCVE})$ problem, which can be naturally expressed as a special case of the Red-Blue Set Cover problem. We present a polynomial-time $2$-approximation algorithm for the $VCVE$ problem, achieving the best possible ratio. papers.content_snippet: In various domination and coverage problems, certain vertices or edges should not be dominated/covered and are designated as vulnerable. Motivated by this, we define the $k$-Vertex Maximum Domination Ratio with Vulnerable Vertices $(k\textit{-}Max \ \mathit{DRVV})$ problem, which extends the budgeted dominating set problem to include vulnerability constraints. We propose an approximation algorithm based on an unbudgeted variant of $k\textit{-}Max \ \mathit{DRVV}$, termed the Maximum Domination Ratio with Vulnerable Vertices $(\mathit{DRVV})$ problem. For bounded-degree graphs of order $n$, our algorithm provides an $O(k/n)$-approximation for the $k\textit{-}Max \ \mathit{DRVV}$ problem. We introduce the Dominating Set with Vulnerable Vertices $(\mathit{DSV})$ problem, reduce it to the Red-Blue Set Cover problem, and derive a $2\sqrt{|V|\cdot(H(\Delta_{N})-\frac{1}{2}})$-approximation algorithm, where $|V|$ is the order of the graph, $\Delta_N$ is the maximum degree among non-vulnerable vertices and $H$ is the harmonic function. Finally, we examine the Vertex Cover with Vulnerable Edges $(\mathit{VCVE})$ problem, which can be naturally expressed as a special case of the Red-Blue Set Cover problem. We present a polynomial-time $2$-approximation algorithm for the $VCVE$ problem, achieving the best possible ratio.
papers.title_zh: 脆弱性约束下的支配与覆盖问题
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 该论文研究图上的支配与覆盖问题，其中某些顶点或边由于脆弱性约束而不应被支配或覆盖。作者定义了带脆弱顶点的最大支配率、带脆弱顶点的支配集以及带脆弱边的点覆盖等问题，并分别给出近似算法或归约方法。整体上，论文是在经典组合优化问题中系统引入“脆弱对象不可触碰”约束，并分析相应的近似可解性。
innovations: 提出带脆弱顶点约束的 k-Vertex Maximum Domination Ratio 问题，扩展了预算化支配集设定。
基于无预算变体 DRVV 为有预算版本构造了近似算法。
将带脆弱顶点的支配集问题归约为 Red-Blue Set Cover 问题并导出近似算法。
给出带脆弱边的点覆盖问题的多项式时间 2-近似算法，并说明其近似比最优。
papers.scenario_cn: 解决在网络、图结构资源选择或设施覆盖中，某些节点或边因风险、敏感性或保护要求而不能被覆盖/支配的情形，适用于受安全约束的图优化、受保护基础设施选择和带禁区约束的覆盖规划。
papers.title_en: Domination and Coverage Problems under Vulnerability Constraints

papers.title: Improving Ad-hoc Search Effectiveness for Conversational Information Retrieval via Model Merging
papers.abstract: Conversational information retrieval is challenging since it requires the consideration of the conversation history which potentially gives rise to topic shifts and coreference resolution across previous turns. To address these challenges, previous work mainly rely on traditional fine-tuning of ad-hoc retrievers on conversational datasets or extrapolates their generalizability through multi-tasking. However, this mainstream approach is costly - since it requires model re-training - and exhibits catastrophic forgetting, where the model loses its foundational ad-hoc retrieval performance. In this paper, we fill this gap by introducing model merging as a training-free strategy enabling the design of a single retrieval model that operates across both ad-hoc and conversational settings with no additional fine-tuning. We conduct experiments using linear and non-linear parameter-wise merging strategies - namely Model Soup and Slerp - on standard ad-hoc search and conversational retrieval datasets. Our results demonstrate that model merging significantly enhances the ad-hoc search capabilities of conversational retrievers while improving generalizability across task-specific datasets, achieving up to 15% higher NDCG@3 under zero-shot conditions.

papers.title_zh: 通过模型合并提升对话式信息检索中的即席搜索效果
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 该论文研究对话式信息检索中如何兼顾会话历史建模能力与传统即席检索能力。作者提出将模型合并作为一种无需额外训练的策略，把面向不同检索设定的模型融合成一个统一检索器，从而同时服务于即席搜索和对话检索。摘要显示，这种方法不仅提升了对话检索模型的即席搜索效果，也增强了跨数据集的泛化能力。
innovations: 提出将模型合并用于对话式信息检索，而不是依赖额外微调或多任务重训练。
以训练自由的方式构建同时适用于即席检索与对话检索的统一模型。
比较了线性与非线性参数级合并策略，包括 Model Soup 和 Slerp。
针对传统微调易造成灾难性遗忘的问题，提供了避免破坏基础即席检索能力的新路径。
papers.scenario_cn: 解决对话检索模型在利用多轮上下文时容易牺牲传统即席搜索能力的问题，适用于搜索系统、会话搜索助手以及需要统一处理单轮查询和多轮检索请求的检索场景。
papers.title_en: Improving Ad-hoc Search Effectiveness for Conversational Information Retrieval via Model Merging

papers.title: Leveraging Color Naming for Image Enhancement
papers.abstract: Enhancing images to make them visually appealing is a persistent challenge in computer vision. Many deep-learning methods train models on paired datasets to replicate expert editing styles. However, these approaches struggle with two key issues: (1) interpretability and (2) a parametrization suitable for user adjustments. To address these challenges, we present NamedCurves+, an approach inspired by the concept of Color Naming, a universal set of familiar colors widely used in software tools for intuitive editing. Our method integrates color names into a learning-based framework, enabling global adjustments for each named color through tone curves. To address local image variations, we incorporate a transformer block that captures spatial dependencies, enabling context-aware edits across the image. NamedCurves+ enhances the retouching process's interpretability and supports user interaction, allowing flexible modifications of individual tone curves to refine the retouched image according to personal preferences. Extensive experiments on tasks such as image retouching, tone mapping, and exposure correction demonstrate that NamedCurves+ outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Notably, our approach is both explainable, as the tone curves explicitly represent how each color name contributes to the enhancement, and interactive, allowing users to customize the retouching process and achieve results tailored to their liking.

papers.title_zh: 利用颜色命名进行图像增强
papers.institution: 未提供
papers.summary_cn: 该论文针对图像增强方法可解释性不足、难以进行用户可控编辑的问题，提出了 NamedCurves+。方法把“颜色命名”这一人类熟悉的颜色概念融入学习式框架，为每个命名颜色建立全局色调曲线，并通过 transformer 模块建模局部空间依赖。摘要表明，该方法在图像润饰、色调映射和曝光校正等任务上优于现有方法，同时具备更好的可解释性和交互性。
innovations: 将颜色命名引入学习式图像增强框架，用命名颜色作为可解释的编辑单元。
为每个命名颜色设计全局色调曲线，使增强过程具备明确的参数化表达。
引入 transformer 模块捕获空间依赖，以支持上下文感知的局部编辑。
同时强调可解释性与用户交互能力，允许用户直接修改各颜色曲线实现个性化增强。
papers.scenario_cn: 解决图像增强与修图任务中“效果好但难解释、难手动调整”的问题，适用于图像润饰、色调映射、曝光校正以及需要人机协同编辑的视觉增强场景。

papers.title: Metrics or Mirage? An Audit of Evaluation Inconsistencies in Colonoscopy Polyp Segmentation Benchmarks
papers.abstract: Progress in colonoscopy polyp segmentation is routinely reported through leaderboard comparisons on a small set of public benchmarks. We argue that this apparent progress is difficult to verify: a systematic audit of \textbf{27 papers} published between 2015 and 2026 reveals three structural problems in how the community evaluates models. \textbf{First}, 25 of 27 papers \textit{omit the Hausdorff distance}. Hausdorff distance is a boundary-accuracy metric with direct clinical relevance for detecting flat or small polyps, and is a standard in radiotherapy segmentation. \textbf{Second}, at least five \textit{incompatible train/test split protocols} co-exist across papers reporting results on the same two datasets (Kvasir-SEG and CVC-ClinicDB), making published Dice scores non-comparable even when they appear in the same leaderboard column. \textbf{Third}, 26 of 27 papers make \textit{performance claims without any statistical significance test}. Strikingly, four papers published \emph{after} the Metrics Reloaded framework~\cite{metricsreloaded2024} (Maier-Hein et al., \textit{Nature Methods} 2024) perpetuate these same problems, suggesting that general-purpose metric guidance has not yet reached the colonoscopy sub-community. To show these problems are not merely cosmetic, we re-evaluate five representative models under three controlled protocols with a single uniform scorer, and find that the reported metric conceals large boundary and recall failures, that the ``best'' model changes with the metric, and that near-tied rankings reverse across random splits. We propose a five-point \textbf{Polyp Segmentation Reporting Checklist}~(PSRC) as a lightweight, domain-adapted corrective.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文并不提出新的息肉分割模型，而是系统审计结肠镜息肉分割文献中的评测做法是否可靠。作者统计了2015到2026年的27篇论文，指出该方向普遍存在边界指标缺失、训练测试划分不一致、缺少统计显著性检验等问题。为说明这些问题会实质影响结论，论文还在统一评分器和受控协议下重新评测了5个代表性模型，发现模型优劣会随着指标和随机划分而改变。
innovations: 将研究重点从“提出更强模型”转向“审计评测流程”，系统揭示息肉分割基准中的结构性评测缺陷。
明确指出 Hausdorff distance 这类边界精度指标在临床相关场景中的重要性，并批评现有工作普遍忽略该指标。
通过统一评分器和多种受控协议的复评，证明排行榜结论会因指标选择和数据划分不同而发生反转。
提出一个面向该子领域的五点式 Polyp Segmentation Reporting Checklist（PSRC），作为轻量化报告规范。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向结肠镜息肉分割研究的评测与基准构建场景，主要解决不同论文结果不可比、排行榜结论可能失真的问题。适用于医学图像分割论文复现、基准清洗、评测协议制定和审稿质检等场景。
papers.title_en: Metrics or Mirage? An Audit of Evaluation Inconsistencies in Colonoscopy Polyp Segmentation Benchmarks

papers.title: PolyUQuest: Verifiable Structure-Aware Web RAG over Heterogeneous Graphs
papers.abstract: Existing retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems treat web pages as flat text, losing the structural and semantic signals encoded in HTML. We present PolyUQuest, a verifiable, structure-aware web RAG framework built on a heterogeneous graph that unifies hyperlink topology between pages, DOM hierarchy within pages, and entity-relation knowledge across pages. A two-tier router dispatches each query to one of three retrieval modes matched to its structural need, including direct block retrieval, cross-page graph traversal, and multi-hop entity reasoning. Every answer is fully verifiable, as each cited block carries its source page, heading path, and entity links so that users can trace any claim back to its structural evidence. We evaluate on the official websites of the Hong Kong Polytechnic University (PolyU), comprising 4,240 pages, 31,086 DOM blocks, 29,119 entities, and 37,680 relations, together with a multi-type evaluation benchmark. PolyUQuest outperforms existing RAG systems in answer correctness, coverage, and faithfulness, while consuming significantly fewer LLM tokens per query. The demonstration provides an interactive interface for inspecting cited answers, comparing retrieval traces across routing modes, and exploring evidence graph paths. PolyUQuest is being prepared for deployment as a student-facing QA service at PolyU.

We present PolyUQuest, a verifiable, structure-aware web RAG framework built on a heterogeneous graph that unifies hyperlink topology between pages, DOM hierarchy within pages, and entity-relation knowledge across pages. A two-tier router dispatches each query to one of three retrieval modes matched to its structural need, including direct block retrieval, cross-page graph traversal, and multi-hop entity reasoning. Every answer is fully verifiable, as each cited block carries its source page, heading path, and entity links so that users can trace any claim back to its structural evidence. We evaluate on the official websites of the Hong Kong Polytechnic University (PolyU), comprising 4,240 pages, 31,086 DOM blocks, 29,119 entities, and 37,680 relations, together with a multi-type evaluation benchmark. papers.title_zh: PolyUQuest：基于异构图的可验证结构感知网页检索增强生成
papers.institution: 香港理工大学
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出 PolyUQuest，针对现有 Web RAG 把网页当作纯平面文本处理、忽略 HTML 结构信息的问题，构建了一个基于异构图的结构感知检索增强框架。该方法将页面间超链接、页内 DOM 层级以及跨页面实体关系统一表示，并通过双层路由为不同查询选择直接块检索、跨页图遍历或多跳实体推理。系统强调答案可验证性，每条引用都保留来源页面、标题路径和实体链接，便于追溯证据。
innovations: 将网页间超链接拓扑、页内 DOM 层次和跨页面实体关系统一到同一异构图中，增强 Web RAG 对结构信息的利用。
设计双层路由机制，根据查询的结构需求动态分配到不同检索模式，而非单一检索流程。
把“可验证性”作为核心设计目标，使答案证据能够精确回溯到页面块、标题路径和实体链接。
在高校官网问答场景中构建多类型评测基准，并同时关注正确性、覆盖率、忠实性与 token 开销。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向机构官网、知识门户、复杂文档网站等结构化网页问答场景，解决传统 RAG 忽略 HTML 结构与跨页关系、证据难追溯的问题。适用于学生问答、校园信息检索、企业知识门户和可审计问答系统。
papers.title_en: PolyUQuest: Verifiable Structure-Aware Web RAG over Heterogeneous Graphs

papers.title: Understanding Axes of Difficulty For Long Context Tasks Via PredicateLongBench
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated rapidly improving long-context capabilities, prompting a wave of benchmarks designed to evaluate them. However, existing long-context evaluations - from Needle-in-a-Haystack (NIAH) tests to more recent multi-hop reasoning and summarization tasks - predominantly measure average-case performance, and many are either saturated or lack robustness. Notably absent is a systematic way to probe how models perform as we scale up the difficulty of tasks along various axes. We address this gap by proposing PredicateLongBench, a benchmark that stress-tests long-context reasoning by asking models to identify the longest contiguous subsequence of words in a long input that satisfies given predicates/constraints (e.g., lexicographic ordering), drawn from a broader predicate class. The central innovation of our benchmark is the identification and systematic exploration of multiple different axes of difficulty which test multiple aspects of long context understanding. We provide two complementary generation pipelines - a fully synthetic setup using random word-like strings, and a real-world setup that samples words from natural documents while preserving their distributional properties. We find that frontier models struggle to perform well as we scale up the difficulty of tasks along our axes, demonstrating the utility of our benchmark in understanding the limitations of current long-context capabilities. Furthermore, the tasks in PredicateLongBench, though challenging, are conceptually simple and do not require LLM-based generations or judges.

papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出 PredicateLongBench，用于系统分析大语言模型在长上下文任务中的难度来源，而不是只看平均表现。基准任务要求模型在长输入中找出满足给定谓词或约束的最长连续词序列，以此沿多个难度维度对模型进行压力测试。作者同时提供了完全合成和真实文档采样两种数据生成流程，并指出当前前沿模型在难度提升时仍明显吃力。
innovations: 提出 PredicateLongBench，将长上下文评测从平均性能比较推进到沿多种难度轴进行系统化应力测试。
使用“满足给定谓词的最长连续子序列”这一概念上简单但推理要求高的任务形式，减少评测噪声。
提供合成数据与真实文档采样两条互补生成管线，使基准兼具可控性与贴近真实分布的特性。
强调无需依赖 LLM 生成器或 LLM 裁判即可完成评测，提高基准的稳健性与可复验性。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向长上下文理解与推理能力评测，解决现有基准易饱和、缺少难度控制和鲁棒性分析的问题。适用于长上下文模型比较、能力诊断、压力测试以及新型上下文机制的研究评估。
papers.title_en: Understanding Axes of Difficulty For Long Context Tasks Via PredicateLongBench
